elements.passageText5: <sup>5</sup>When Jesus saw their faith, he said to the paralytic, ‘Child, your sins are forgiven.’ <sup>6</sup>Now some of the experts in the law were sitting there, questioning in their hearts, <sup>7</sup>’Why does this man speak this way? He is blaspheming! Who can forgive sins but God alone?’ <sup>8</sup>Now immediately, when Jesus realized in his spirit that they were contemplating such thoughts, he said to them, ‘Why are you thinking such things in your hearts? <sup>9</sup>Which is easier, to say to the paralytic, "Your sins are forgiven," or to say, "Stand up, take your mat, and walk"? <sup>10</sup>But so that you may know that the Son of Man has authority on earth to forgive sins’—he said to the paralytic— <sup>11</sup>’I tell you, stand up, take your mat, and go home.’ <sup>12</sup>And he stood up, took his mat immediately, and went out before them all. They were all amazed and glorified God, saying, ‘We’ve never seen anything like this!’

elements.question1: Shugabannin addini sun tambayi, ‘Wa yake da ikon gafarta zunubi banda Allah kaɗai?’ Ta yaya amsar Yesu ta amsa tambayarsu?
elements.question2: Ardiiɓe diina ƴami, ‘Moye waawata yaafaaki hakke to naa’ Allah tan?’ Noy nootital Yeesu jaabitori ƴamol maɓɓe?
elements.question3: The religious leaders ask, ‘Who can forgive sins but God alone?’ How does Jesus’ response answer their question?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Shugabannin addini sun gane daidai cewa Allah kaɗai ne zai iya gafarta zunubi — kuma Yesu bai gyara su a wannan batu ba. Maimakon haka, ya yarda da tunanin sa’an nan ya aiki akan sa. Ya warkar da shanyayyen a matsayin hujja mai ganuwa cewa yana da ikon yin abin da Allah kaɗai zai iya yi: gafarta zunubi. Yesu ba yana da’awar gafarta zunubi a madadin Allah ba ne, kamar yadda firist zai yi; yana da’awa ya yi ta hakkines. Tambayarsa — ‘wanne ya fi sauƙi?’ — tarko ne: tunda duka biyu ba zai yiwu ga mutum kawai ba, yin ɗaya a bainar jama’a yana tabbatar da ikon yin ɗayan. Mu’ujizin shi ne amsar tambayarsu.
elements.questionHint1: Tunanin shugabannin addini shi ne: Allah kaɗai yana gafarta zunubi, saboda haka Yesu yana yin saɓo ta wurin da’awar yin haka — amma me Yesu ya yi a gaba, kuma ta yaya wannan aikin ya amsa zargin maimakon jayayya da shi kawai?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Ardiiɓe diina ɓen ganndii goonga tan Allah tan waawata yaafugo hakke — Yeesu kadi waɗaayii gollugo e maɓɓe dow ndee tiiɗunde. E nder ɗum, o jaaɓiti taaɗiinde nden o gollorii e maɗɗe. O hisnii jaraaɗo on ko seede yi’eteeɗo wonde o jogii laamu ngam waɗugol ko Allah tan waawata waɗugol: yaafugo hakke. Yeesu wi’ataa o yaafoo hakke ngam laamu Allah, ko nii ardiiɗo diina waɗata; o wi’i o waɗa e nder laamu maako hoore muuɗum. Ƴamol maako — ‘ko ɓuri hoyki?’ — woni tarko: tawa ɗi ɗiɗi ngalaa laawol ngam neɗɗo tan, waɗugol gooto yeeso yimɓe tabbintata laamu ngam waɗugol goɗɗo. Hayɗu on woni jaabawol maako e ƴamol maɓɓe.
elements.questionHint2: Miijo ardiiɓe diina ɓen wonnoo: Allah tan yaafoo hakke, ngam ɗume Yeesu fottidina hoore maako e Allah nde o wi’a o waɗata ɗum — ammaa ɗume Yeesu waɗi gaɗa, e noy gollawal ngol jaabori zarnaare nden to naa’ jaaɓitual tan e maɗɗe?
elements.sampleAnswer3: The religious leaders correctly identify that only God can forgive sins — and Jesus does not correct them on that point. Instead, He accepts the premise and then acts on it. He heals the paralysed man as visible proof that He has the authority to do what only God can do: forgive sins. Jesus is not claiming to forgive sins on God’s behalf, as a priest might; He is claiming to do it in His own right. His question — ‘which is easier?’ — is a trap: since both are impossible for a mere human, doing one publicly proves the authority to do the other. The miracle is His answer to their question.
elements.questionHint3: The religious leaders’ logic was: only God forgives sins, therefore Jesus is blaspheming by claiming to do it — but what does Jesus do next, and how does that action respond to the charge rather than simply arguing against it?

elements.passageText1: <sup>8</sup>Sai Filibus ya ce masa, "Ya Ubangiji, ka nuna mana Uban, bukatarmu ta biya ke nan." <sup>9</sup>Yesu ya ce masa, "Na daɗe tare da ku haka, amma har yanzu ba ka san ni ba, Filibus? Duk wanda ya gan ni, ai, ya ga Uban. Yaya za ka ce, ‘Nuna mana Uban’"?
elements.passageText3: <sup>8</sup>Filibus ya ce, "Ubangiji, ka nuna mana Uban, wannan kuwa zai biya bukatarmu." <sup>9</sup>Yesu ya amsa ya ce, "Ba san ni ba, Filibus, duk da daɗewan nan da na yi tare da ku? Duk wanda ya gan ni, ai, ya ga Uban. Yaya za ka ce, ‘Ka nuna mana Uban’?
elements.passageText4: <sup>8</sup>Filibus wi’imo, "Moodibbo, hollumin Nyaako Mo Dow on, non heƴiimin." <sup>9</sup>Yeesu nootii wi’i, "Filibus, ko neeɓi e mi wondi e mooɗon, ammaa fuu e non a andaayam? Koo moye giiɗoyam yi’ii Nyaako Mo Dow. Ngam ɗume mbi’ataa mi holla’on Nyaako Mo Dow?
elements.passageText5: <sup>8</sup>Philip said to him, ‘Lord, show us the Father, and we will be content.’ <sup>9</sup>Jesus replied, ‘Have I been with you for so long, and you have not known me, Philip? The person who has seen me has seen the Father! How can you say, "Show us the Father"?’

elements.question1: Wacce da’awa Yesu yake yi lokacin da ya ce ’duk wanda ya gan ni, ai, ya ga Uban’?
elements.question2: Ɗume Yeesu yiɗi wi’ugo nde o wi’i ’koo moye giiɗoyam yi’ii Nyaako Mo Dow’?
elements.question3: What claim is Jesus making when He says ’whoever has seen me has seen the Father’?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Yesu yana da’awa cewa ba kawai wakilin Uba ko jakadan sa ba ne, sai dai yana bayyana Uba kuma yana nuna shi sosai har iya ganin sa shi ne ganin Uba. Wannan da’awa ce mai ban mamaki: yana nufin idan kana son sanin yaya Allah yake — tausayinsa, gaskiyarsa, halinsa ga masu zunubi, shiriyarsa don shan wahala — ka duba Yesu. Yesu ba ya nuna mutane wanin kansa don su sami Allah; yana cewa ana samin Allah a cikinsa. Wannan da’awa ce ta kai tsaye ta raba yanayin Allah da sunan Uba.
elements.questionHint1: Filibus ya so a nuna masa Uba kamar dai Yesu da Uba abubuwa biyu ne daban-daban da za a same su — me ya sa Yesu ya sami wannan tambayar mai ban mamaki sosai, kuma me mamakinsansa ke nuna maka game da yadda yake ganin dangantakarsa da Uba?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Yeesu wi’i o wanaa tan wakilaaɗo koo jannguɗo saƙa daga Baaba on, ammaa o hollitii Baaba on e nanndi e makko haa timmi wonde yi’ugol mo ko yi’ugol Baaba on. Ɗum woni da’aawa hayɗunde sanne: o hollita to ndaɗɗa andugol no Alla wa’i — nunaare muuɗum, goonga muuɗum, miijo muuɗum e maaybe, taƴugol muuɗum ngam tampugol — mba ndaara Yeesu. Yeesu noppataa yimɓe e hoore muuɗum ngam njahi njiɓa Alla; o wi’i Alla yi’etee e nder maako. Ɗum woni da’aawa tiiɗunde ngam rewnugol nder yontere Allah e innde Baaba on.
elements.questionHint2: Filibus ƴami hollugol Baaba on ko nii Yeesu e Baaba on ɗiɗi ko ɗume ceerɗe njoftaa — ngam ɗume Yeesu yi’i ndee ƴamre ɗaɓɓunde sanne, e ɗume hayɗari maako hollita ma e no o yi’ata jokkondiral maako e Baaba on?
elements.sampleAnswer3: Jesus is claiming that He is not merely a representative or messenger of the Father, but that He so perfectly reveals and embodies the Father that seeing Him is seeing the Father. This is an extraordinary claim: it means that if you want to know what God is like — His compassion, His honesty, His attitude to sinners, His willingness to suffer — you look at Jesus. Jesus does not point people away from Himself to find God; He says that God is found in Him. It is a direct claim to share in the divine nature and identity of the Father.
elements.questionHint3: Philip wanted to be shown the Father as if Jesus and the Father were two entirely separate things to find — why does Jesus find this question so bewildering, and what does His surprise tell you about how closely He sees Himself as connected to the Father?

elements.passageText1: <sup>37</sup>Sai babban hadari mai iska ya taso, raƙuman ruwa kuma na ta fantsama cikin jirgin, har jirgin ya tasar wa cika da ruwa. <sup>38</sup>Yesu kuwa na daga ƙarshen baya na jirgin a kan matashi, yana barci. Sai suka tashe shi, suka ce masa, "Malam, za mu hallaka ba ka kula ba ko?" <sup>39</sup>Sai ya farka, ya tsawata wa iskar, ya kuma ce wa ruwan tekun, "Natsu! Ka yi shiru!" Sai iskar ta kwanta, wurin duk ya yi tsit. <sup>40</sup>Ya ce musu, "Don me kuka firgita haka? Har yanzu ba ku da bangaskiya ne?" <sup>41</sup>Sai suka tsorata, matuƙar tsoro, suka ce wa juna, "Wa ke nan kuma, wanda har iska da ruwan teku ma suke yi masa biyayya?"
elements.passageText3: <sup>37</sup>Sai babban hadari mai iska ya tashi, raƙuman ruwa suna ta bugun jirgin ruwan, har jirgin ruwan ya kusa yă cika da ruwa. <sup>38</sup>Yesu kuwa yana can baya, yana barci a kan katifa. Sai almajiran suka tashe shi suka ce masa, "Malam, ba ka kula ba ko mu nutse?" <sup>39</sup>Sai ya farka ya tsawata wa iskar, ya ce wa raƙuman ruwan, "Shiru! Ku natsu!" Sai iskar ta kwanta, kome kuma ya yi tsit. <sup>40</sup>Sai ya ce wa almajiransa, "Don me kuke tsoro haka? Har yanzu ba ku da bangaskiya ne?" <sup>41</sup>Suka tsorata, suka ce wa juna, "Wane ne wannan? Har iska da raƙuman ruwa ma suna masa biyayya!"
elements.passageText4: <sup>37</sup>Sey iyeende e hendu cembindu ummoyii, geelooɗi ndiyam puɗɗi piiki komiwal ngal, ndiyam natti nder maagal haa naaki komiwal ngal ɓadii heewa ndiyam. <sup>38</sup>Yeesu boo e ton gaɗa komiwal ngal e ɗaanii dow ɓantirɗum hoore. Sey tokkuɓemo pindinimo mbi’imo, "Moodibbo, a wannaayi to en kalkii?" <sup>39</sup>Sey o ummii, o haɓani hendu ndun, o wi’i geelooɗi ndiyam ɗin, "Nde’’itee! Alee!" Sey hendu ndun ali, koo ɗume de’’iti. <sup>40</sup>O wi’i tokkuɓemo, "Ngam ɗume ngooduɗon kulol? Haa jooni on koolaakiyam?" <sup>41</sup>Ɓe kultori, ɓe ƴamƴamtiri, ɓe mbi’i, "Ɗum moye o’o? Haa hendu e geelooɗi ndiyam e ngaɗa ko o wi’i!"
elements.passageText5: <sup>37</sup>Now a great windstorm developed and the waves were breaking into the boat, so that the boat was nearly swamped. <sup>38</sup>But he was in the stern, sleeping on a cushion. They woke him up and said to him, ‘Teacher, don’t you care that we are about to die?’ <sup>39</sup>So he got up and rebuked the wind, and said to the sea, ‘Be quiet! Calm down!’ Then the wind stopped, and it was dead calm. <sup>40</sup>And he said to them, ‘Why are you cowardly? Do you still not have faith?’ <sup>41</sup>They were overwhelmed with fear and said to one another, ‘Who then is this? Even the wind and the sea obey him!’

elements.question1: Almajiran sun tambayi ’Wa ke nan kuma?’ bayan Yesu ya kwantar da hadari. Wane amsa wannan mu’ujizin ke nuna?
elements.question2: Tokkuɓe maako ƴami ’Ɗum moye o’o?’ gaɗa Yeesu de’itini henndu ndun. Ɗume jaabol kaayeefi o’o holli?
elements.question3: The disciples ask ’Who then is this?’ after Jesus calms the storm. What answer does this miracle point to?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Tambayar almajiran ta dace, kuma mu’ujizin kansa yana ba da amsar. A Tsohon Alkawari, Allah ne ke umartar tekuna da iskoki — halitta tana biyayya ga Mahaliccinta. Lokacin da Yesu ya tsawata wa hadari kuma ya kwanta nan da nan, yana yin abin da Allah kaɗai yake yi. Almajiran ba mamaki kawai ba ne suka yi; suka ’tsorata matuƙar tsoro’ — wani amsa da Littafi Mai Tsarki yawanci yake nuna a lokacin haduwa da Mai Iko. Mu’ujizin yana nuna amsar: wannan shi ne Allah kansa cikin jikin mutum, wanda ya halicci teku kuma saboda haka yana da iko a kanta.
elements.questionHint1: A Tsohon Alkawari, wane ne aka bayyana da ikon umartar teku da iskoki? Da sanin haka, wane kammalawa ne kamar yadda Markus yake so mai karatu ya zana daga tambayar almajiran?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Ƴamol tokkuɓemo on ko ƴamol dogi, e hayɗu on hoore muuɗum hokkata jaabawol. E nder Tawreeta, Allah woni mo haɓana maɓɓe e geelooɗi ndiyam — ko tagaa biyata Tagɗo. Nde Yeesu haɓani iyeende nde nden e ɗon ɗon ali, o waɗorii ko Allah tan waɗata. Tokkuɓemo ɓen ngalaa ko ɓe hayɗini kaŋŋe tan; ɓe ’kultori’ — jaabawol ngo e nder Biibal ɗon holtiniree nde neɗɗo andira Allah. Hayɗu on hollita jaabawol: o’o woni Allah kanko nder nguurndam neɗɗo, mo tagi maɓɓe e geelooɗi ndiyam ɗin e nder ɗum jogii laamu dow maɗɗe.
elements.questionHint2: E nder Tawreeta, hol ko baylanaa e jogugol laamu dow maɓɓe e iyeende? Dow fii ɗu’um, ɗume jaabawol no Markus yiɗi joolooɗo yonkita daga ƴamol tokkuɓemo ɓen?
elements.sampleAnswer3: The disciples’ question is the right one, and the miracle itself supplies the answer. In the Old Testament, it is God who commands the seas and the winds — nature obeys its Creator. When Jesus rebukes the storm and it immediately calms, He is doing something that only God does. The disciples were not just impressed; they were ’overwhelmed with fear’ — a response that in Scripture is typically prompted by an encounter with the divine. The miracle points to the answer: this is God Himself in human form, the one who made the sea and therefore has authority over it.
elements.questionHint3: In the Old Testament, who is described as having authority over the sea and storms? Knowing that, what conclusion does it seem like Mark wants the reader to draw from the disciples’ question?

elements.passageText1: <sup>25</sup>Yesu ya ce mata, "Ai, ni ne tashin matattu, ni ne kuma rai. Wanda ya gaskata da ni, ko ya mutu zai rayu. <sup>43</sup>Da ya faɗi haka ya ɗaga murya da ƙarfi ya ce, "Li’azaru fito!" <sup>44</sup>Sai mamacin ya fito, ƙafa da hannu a ɗaure da likkafani, fuska tasa kuma a naɗe da mayani. Yesu ya ce musu, "Ku kwance masa, ya tafi."
elements.passageText3: <sup>25</sup>Yesu ya ce mata, "Ni ne tashin matattu da kuma rai. Duk wanda ya gaskata da ni zai rayu, ko ya mutu; <sup>43</sup>Sa’ad da ya faɗa haka, sai Yesu ya yi kira da babbar murya ya ce, "Lazarus, ka fito!" <sup>44</sup>Sai mamacin ya fito, hannuwansa da ƙafafunsa a daure da ƙyallayen lilin, fuskarsa kuwa an naɗe da mayafi.
elements.passageText4: <sup>25</sup>Yeesu wi’imo, "Min woni umminayɗo mayɓe, min woni kokkayɗo yonki. Koo moye kooliiɗoyam, koo o maayii, o fuɗɗitay o waɗa yonki. <sup>43</sup>Gaɗa o wi’ii non, o noddi e sembe, "Li’aajaru, wurtoya!" <sup>44</sup>Sey mayɗo on wurtoyii daga nder yenaande nden, ɓandu maako e taariraa wudere, juuɗe maako e koyɗe maako e kaɓɓiraa lefi, yeeso maako boo e taariraa lefol feere. Yeesu wi’iɓe, "Taarteemo, alonmo o dilla."
elements.passageText5: <sup>25</sup>Jesus said to her, ‘I am the resurrection and the life. The one who believes in me will live even if he dies.’ ... <sup>43</sup>When he had said this, he shouted in a loud voice, ‘Lazarus, come out!’ <sup>44</sup>The one who had died came out, his feet and hands tied up with strips of cloth, and a cloth wrapped around his face. Jesus said to them, ‘Unwrap him and let him go.’

elements.question1: Yesu ya ce ’ni ne tashin matattu kuma ni ne rai’ — sa’an nan ya nuna hakan. Me hakan ke gaya mana game da ikonsà a kan mutuwa?
elements.question2: Yeesu wi’i ’Min woni umminayɗo mayɓe e kokkayɗo yonki’ — nden o holli ɗum. Ɗume ɗu’um holli en dow laamu maako dow maayde?
elements.question3: Jesus says ’I am the resurrection and the life’ — then demonstrates it. What does this tell us about His authority over death?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Yesu bai ce yana iya kawo tashin matattu ba ko ya san hanyar zuwa rai — ya ce shi ne tashin matattu da kuma rai. Da’awa ce ta ainihi, ba kawai da’awa ta iyawa ba. Sa’an nan ya nuna hakan nan da nan ta hanyar kiran mutumin da ya mutu kwana huɗu daga kabarinsa ta umarni ɗaya. Mutuwa ba ta da ƙarfin tsayawa a gaba da shi. Hakan yana gaya mana cewa ikonsa a kan mutuwa ba aro ba ne ko da iyaka ba — yana cikin kasancewarsa. Kuma domin shi ne tashin matattu da rai, alkawarin da yake yi wa masu bangaskiya — cewa za su rayu ko sun mutu — ya dogara ne a kan kasancewarsa da ikonsà da kansa.
elements.questionHint1: Lura cewa Yesu ya ce ’ni ne tashin matattu’ maimakon ’ina iya kawo tashin matattu’ — me bambancin tsakanin waɗannan da’awa biyu, kuma me hakan ke nuna game da inda ikonsa a kan mutuwa ke zaune da gaske?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Yeesu wi’aay o waawata waɗugol umminaaje koo o anndata laawol ngam yonki — o wi’i kanko woni umminayɗo mayɓe e kokkayɗo yonki. Ɗum woni da’aawa yontere, hoto tan da’aawa bawɗe. O nden tabbintii ɗum e ɗon ɗon e nder noddugol mo maayunoo balɗe nay e nder yenaande maako e yamiroore gooto. Maayde walaa bawɗe ngam tottugol mo. Ɗum hollita laamu maako dow maayde wanaa hollanaaki koo famɗungol — ɗum woni nder yontere muuɗum. E ngam kanko woni umminayɗo mayɓe e kokkayɗo yonki, alkawol o waɗi koolooɓe — wonde ɓe ngadda yonki koo ɓe mbaayii — ɗum dandoraa e yontere e bawɗe muuɗum kanko.
elements.questionHint2: Hito Yeesu wi’i ’min woni umminayɗo’ to naa’ ’min waawata waɗugol umminaaje’ — ko woni saɓaare hakkunde da’aaje ɗiɗi ɗin, e ɗume ɗum hollita e to bawɗe dow maayde ngaddata goonga?
elements.sampleAnswer3: Jesus does not say He can bring resurrection or that He knows the way to life — He says He is the resurrection and the life. It is an identity claim, not just a capability claim. He then immediately backs it up by calling a man who had been dead for four days out of his tomb with a single command. Death had no power to resist Him. This tells us that Jesus’ authority over death is not borrowed or limited — it is intrinsic to who He is. And because He is the resurrection and the life, the promise He makes to believers — that they will live even if they die — rests on His own identity and power.
elements.questionHint3: Notice that Jesus says ’I am the resurrection’ rather than ’I can perform resurrections’ — what is the difference between those two statements, and what does it suggest about where the power over death actually resides?

elements.question: What do you think of when you hear Jesus described as ’the Son of God’? Think about it before tapping ’Find out’.
elements.answer: People sometimes assume this means Jesus is in some way less than God — a divine being, perhaps, but not fully God Himself. The Bible, however, uses ’Son of God’ to mean the opposite. When Jesus claimed to be the Son of God, his listeners understood it as a claim to be equal with God (John 5:18). ’Son of’ in this context conveys nature and identity, not origin or rank. Jesus is fully God — not a lesser divine being, and not a created figure who became divine.

elements.text1: Shin, Yesu ya fuskanci jarabawa? Shin ya yi zunubi?
elements.text2: Yeesu foondaama naa? O waɗii hakke naa?
elements.text3: Was Jesus tempted? Did He sin?

elements.passageText1: <sup>15</sup>Gama Babban Firist da muke da shi ba marar juyayin kasawarmu ba ne, a’a, shi ne wanda aka jarabce shi ta kowace harga da aka jarabce mu, amma bai yi zunubi ba.
elements.passageText3: <sup>15</sup>Gama babban firist da muke da shi ba marar juyayin kāsawarmu ba ne, amma muna da wanda aka gwada ta kowace hanya, kamar dai yadda akan yi mana, duk da haka bai yi zunubi ba.
elements.passageText4: <sup>15</sup>Mawɗo Mawɓe Ardiiɓe Diina mo ngooduɗen naa’ o goɗɗo mo waawataa yurminanki’en enen tampuɓe. Ammaa o foondaama e koo ngole laawol no ɗum foondirta’en, fuu e non o waɗaayi hakke.
elements.passageText5: <sup>15</sup>For we do not have a high priest incapable of sympathizing with our weaknesses, but one who has been tempted in every way just as we are, yet without sin.

elements.question1: Bisa ga wannan ayar, ta yaya gogewar Yesu ta jarabawa ke shafar iyawarsa ta taimakon mu lokacin da muke fuskancin jarabawa?
elements.question2: Dow aayaare nde’e, noy foondaaki Yeesu wallata mo wallugo en nde en poondaama?
elements.question3: According to this verse, how does Jesus’ experience of temptation affect His ability to help us when we are tempted?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Marubuci ya ce domin an jarabci Yesu ta kowace hanya kamar yadda muke, yana iya jin tausayin rauni namu — ba daga nesa ba, sai dai daga gogewar kansa. Ba babban firist ba ne wanda ya kare daga matsalolin da muke fuskanta; ya san abin da ke nufi ji jan jarabawa daga ciki. Hakan yana nufin lokacin da muke zuwa gare shi cikin gwagwarmayarmu, ba mu zuwa waje da wani wanda ya girgiza kuma ya ce ’ban fahimci yadda hakan ke ji ba.’ Muna zuwa waje da wanda ya fahimci, kuma — abin muhimmanci — ya shawo kanta ba tare da zunubi ba, wanda ke nufi ya san hanyar da za a bi.
elements.questionHint1: Yi tunani game da ko za ka fi so neman taimako daga wanda ya karanta kawai game da wata gogewa mai wahala ko daga wanda ya taɓa fuskantar ta da kansa — ta yaya hakan ke shafi abin da wannan ayar take cewa game da Yesu?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Windiijo on wi’i ngam Yeesu foondaama e koo ngole laawol no ɗum foondirta’en, o waawata yurminanki’en tampuɓe men — hoto woɗɗere, ammaa daga golle muuɗum kanko. O wanaa Mawɗo Ardiiɗo Diina mo riiwaa daga caɗeele en nji’ata; o anndi goonga ko woni nanngi jan foondaare daga nder. Ɗum hollita nde ngartaten e makko e nder fiyakugol men, en ngartataako e goɗɗo mo renata wi’a ’mi anndaa no ɗum wa’i’. En ngartata e mo anndi, e — ko mawni — mo waɗii e makko o waɗaayi hakke, ko hollita o anndi laawol ngol e maɓɓe.
elements.questionHint2: Miijo e to mbaɗata ndaɗɗa ballal daga mo yiɗii tan janngugol e caɗeele caɗende koo daga mo yoɓii goonga e nder maɗɗe kanko — noy ɗum naatata e ko ndee aaya haalanta en e Yeesu?
elements.sampleAnswer3: The writer says that because Jesus was tempted in every way just as we are, He is able to sympathise with our weaknesses — not from a distance, but from personal experience. He is not a high priest who is immune to the pressures we face; He knows what it is to feel the pull of temptation from the inside. This means that when we come to Him in our struggle, we are not coming to someone who shrugs and says ’I don’t understand what that feels like.’ We are coming to one who does understand, and who — crucially — came through it without sin, which means He knows the way through.
elements.questionHint3: Think about whether you would rather seek help from someone who has only read about a difficult experience or from someone who has actually been through it themselves — how does that apply to what this verse is saying about Jesus?

elements.text1: Gaskiya al’amari
elements.text2: Goongaaji mawɗi
elements.text3: Key truths

elements.text1:
Yesu Allah (Ɗan Allah kuma) shi kuma yana raye tun fil’azal.

’Tun fil’azal akwai Kalma, Kalman nan kuwa tare da Allah yake, Kalman nan kuwa Allah ne.’

Yahaya 1:1

Buɗaɗiyar/tabbatacciyar gaskiya: Kasancewar Yesu yayi rayuwa irin ta mutum, Ya gane me jarabawa ke nufi ya kuma fuskanci ƙalubale.

’Gama Babban Firist da muke da shi ba marar juyayin kasawarmu ba ne, a’a, shi ne wanda aka jarabce shi ta kowace hanya da aka jarabce mu, amma bai yi zunubi ba.’

Ibraniyawa 4:15
elements.text2:
Yeesu woni Allah (Ɓii Allah kadi) kanko woni gila ko duuniyaaru tagee.

"Daga ko duuniyaaru tagee bi’eteeɗo Wolde e ɗon, e mo wondi e Allah, nden o Allah." — Yaya 1:1

Ngam Yeesu wuurdii no neɗɗo nii, o faamii goonga foondaaki e caɗeele ɗe en nji’ata.

"Mawɗo Mawɓe Ardiiɓe Diina mo ngooduɗen naa’ o goɗɗo mo waawataa yurminanki’en enen tampuɓe. Ammaa o foondaama e koo ngole laawol no ɗum foondirta’en, fuu e non o waɗaayi hakke." — Iburani’en 4:15
elements.text3:
Jesus is God (the Son of God) and He has always existed.

"In the beginning was the Word, and the Word was with God, and the Word was God." — John 1:1

Because Jesus lived as a human being, He truly understands the temptations and problems we face.

"For we do not have a high priest who is unable to feel sympathy for our weaknesses, but we have one who has been tempted in every way, just as we are – yet he did not sin." — Hebrews 4:15

elements.text1: Abubuwa tunani akai
elements.text2: Fii nyumugo dow muuɗum
elements.text3: To think about

elements.question1: Tayaya za ka/ki iya ƙoƙarin gamsar da ɗan’uwa ko aboki cewar Yesu ya wuce a ce da shi malami nagari kawai
elements.question2: Noy munnitortoɗaa higiraaɓe maa wonde Yeesu ɓuri wonugo tan moodibbo lobbo?
elements.question3: How would you try to convince your friends that Jesus was more than a good teacher?

elements.question1: Idan aka tambaye ka/ki, ‘Yaya kamanin Yesu yake?’ Ya za ka/ki amsa wannan tambayar?
elements.question2: To a ƴamaama ƴamol ngol, ‘Noy Yeesu wa’i?’, noy nootitortoɗaa?
elements.question3: If asked the question, ‘What is Jesus like?’, how would you answer?

elements.text1: Ruhu Mai Tsarki shine ya kasan na uku acikin Tirniti, ba mai ’tilastawa’ bane kamar yarda mutane da yawa ke tunani. Ya kasance na uku a cikin Tirniti, kasance ɗaya da Allah Uba da Allah Ɗa (Yesu Almasihu). An kuma ƙara sanar da Ruhu Mai Tsarki a matsayin Ruhun Yesu (kuma Ruhun Almasihu da kuma Ruhun Ɗan Allah).
elements.text2: Ruuhu Ceniiɗo woni tergal Tati-In-Go’o (Triniti) ɓurngal saɗtude faamu. Yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe miijoto ko kanko woni sembe nii walla nanngol ruuhuuyankeewol ngol laaɓaa. Ammaa Linjiila ɗon laaɓi: kanko woni neɗɗo — neɗɗo tati bi’eteeɗo nder Tati-In-Go’o, e mo wondi e Allah Baaba e Allah Ɓii. Ruuhu Ceniiɗo ɗon noddetee kadi nder Linjiila dow wonugo Ruuhu Yeesu (e Ruuhu Almasiihu e Ruuhu Ɓii Allah).
elements.text3: The Holy Spirit is perhaps the least understood member of the Trinity. Many people think of Him as an impersonal force or a vague spiritual feeling. But the Bible is clear: He is a person — the third person of the Trinity, alongside God the Father and God the Son. The Holy Spirit is also referred to in the Bible as the Spirit of Jesus (and of Christ and of God’s Son).

elements.text1: Tayaya mu ka san cewar Ruhun Mai Tsarki na ɗaya daga cikin Tirniti
elements.text2: Noy nji’irten Ruuhu Ceniiɗo woni neɗɗo?
elements.text3: How do we know that the Holy Spirit is a person?

elements.passageText1: <sup>26</sup>Haka kuma Ruhu yake yi mana taimako a kan gajiyawarmu, domin ba mu ma san abin da ya kamata mu roƙa ba, amma Ruhu da kansa yana yi mana roƙo da nishe-nishen da ba su hurtuwa. <sup>27</sup>Amma shi mai fayyace zukatanmu ya san abin da Ruhu yake niyya, domin bisa ga nufin Allah ne Ruhu yake yi wa tsarkaka roƙo.
elements.passageText3: <sup>26</sup>Haka nan ma, Ruhu yana taimakonmu cikin rashin ƙarfinmu. Ba mu san abin da ya kamata mu roƙa cikin addu’a ba, amma Ruhu kansa yana roƙo a madadinmu da nishe-nishen da kalmomi ba sa iya bayyanawa. <sup>27</sup>Shi kuma wanda yake binciken zukatanmu ya san halin Ruhu, domin Ruhu yana roƙo a madadin tsarkaka bisa ga nufin Allah.
elements.passageText4: <sup>26</sup>Non maa, Ruuhu Allah e walla’en to tampuɗen. Ngam en andaa no haani ngaɗiren do’aare, ammaa Ruuhu Allah e hoore maajum e toroo Allah ngam meeɗen carel ngel ndulluɗen ko mbi’eten en otta. <sup>27</sup>Nden Allah anduɗo ko woni nder ɓerɗe meeɗen, e mo andi ko Ruuhu yiɗi, ngam Ruuhu e toroo Allah ngam yimɓe maako non no o yiɗiri.
elements.passageText5: <sup>26</sup>In the same way, the Spirit helps us in our weakness, for we do not know how we should pray, but the Spirit himself intercedes for us with inexpressible groanings. <sup>27</sup>And he who searches our hearts knows the mind of the Spirit, because the Spirit intercedes on behalf of the saints according to God’s will.

elements.question1: Ruhu yana yin menene a waɗannan ayoyin? Menene wannan ya gaya mana game da yanayin sa a matsayin mutum maifu, ba ƙarfi kawai ba?
elements.question2: Ko Ruuhu waɗata nder aayeeje ɗee? Ko ɗum hollaata en dow wonugo maako neɗɗo, naa’ sembe nii?
elements.question3: What does the Spirit do in these verses? What does this tell us about His nature as a person rather than a force?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: A waɗannan ayoyin, Ruhu yana taimakonmu cikin gajiyawarmu, yana roƙo a madadinmu idan ba mu san yadda za mu roƙa ba, kuma yana yin haka bisa ga nufin Allah — wanda ke nuna yana da ilimin buƙatunmu da manufofin Allah. Waɗannan ba ayyukan ƙarfi marar mutuntaka ba ne. Ƙarfi ba ya roƙo, ba shi da ’hankali’, kuma ba ya nishe-nishe a madadin wani. Roƙo yana buƙatar sani, tausayi, niyya, da dangantaka — waɗannan duk alamomin mutuntaka ne. Wannan ɓangare yana amfani da mai suna ’kansa’, wanda ke ƙarfafa cewa Ruhu ’shi’ ne, ba ’shi’ wani abu ba.
elements.questionHint1: Yi tunani game da abin da roƙo a madadin wani ke ƙunshe da shi — shin iska ko wutar lantarki na iya yin haka? Menene ya buƙata, kuma shin waɗannan halaye na ƙarfi ne ko na mutum?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Nder aayeeje ɗee Ruuhu Allah e wallata en to tampuɗen, e toroo Allah ngam meeɗen to andaaki no ngaɗiren do’aare, e ɗum waɗata non no Allah yiɗiri — ɗum hollata o andi tampuɗe meeɗen e anniya Allah. Ɗee naa kuuɗe sembe mo walaa ɓernde. Sembe ngo’o e torataa Allah ngam moye, walaa ɓernde, e wolataa e ñeeñaaji ngam woɓɓe. Toroorankaagal Allah ngam woɓɓe ina sikkina andal, yurmeende, anniya, e gollorɗum — fuu ɗum alaamaaji wonugo neɗɗo. Aayewol ngol huutortoo innde ’hoore maajum’, ngol hollita Ruuhu ko ’o’ — naa’ huunde.
elements.questionHint2: Miijo fii ko torooreede Allah ngam moye ina sikkina — mbele hendu walla wulaango na waawi waɗude ɗum? Ko waawi ɗum, e ko ɗee ngikkuuji ngoni — ko ngikkuuji sembe naa ko ngikkuuji neɗɗo?

elements.passageText1: <sup>30</sup>Ku kuma kula, kada fa ku ɓata wa Ruhu Mai Tsarki na Allah rai, wanda aka hatimce ku da shi, cewa ku nasa ne a ranar fansa.
elements.passageText3: <sup>30</sup>Kada kuma ku ɓata wa Ruhu Mai Tsarki na Allah rai, wanda da shi aka hatimce ku da shi don ranar fansa.
elements.passageText4: <sup>30</sup>Paamee, to’ mettinanon Ruuhu Allah ɓernde, ngam Allah hokkii’onɗum ngam holla onon ɗum ɓe maako, nden Nyalnde Jaango o rimɗinay’on.
elements.passageText5: <sup>30</sup>And do not grieve the Holy Spirit of God, by whom you were sealed for the day of redemption.

elements.question1: Bulus ya ce za mu iya ’ɓata wa’ Ruhu Mai Tsarki rai. Menene wannan kalmar ta gaya mana game da irin halittar da Ruhu Mai Tsarki yake?
elements.question2: Pool wi’i en mbaaway ’mettinande’ Ruuhu Ceniiɗo ɓernde. Ko konngol ngol hollaata en dow no Ruuhu Ceniiɗo wa’i?
elements.question3: Paul says we can ’grieve’ the Holy Spirit. What does that word tell us about the kind of being the Holy Spirit is?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Jin baƙin ciki amsa ta zuciya ce — tana buƙatar ikon ji, kula, da kuma a shafa shi ta abin da wasu suka aikata. Ba za ka iya ɓata wa ƙarfin halitta rai ba: ba za ka iya ɓata wa wutar lantarki ko nauyi ko iska rai ba. Gaskiyar cewa Bulus ya yi mana gargaɗi kada mu ɓata wa Ruhu Mai Tsarki rai ya gaya mana cewa Ruhu yana da ji kuma ana shafar shi ta fuskar mutum ta yadda muke rayuwa. Wannan ya sanya shi a matsayin mutum ba ƙarfi ba. Haka kuma yana nuna cewa Ruhu yana da dangantaka da mu wacce take kusa ƙwarai har ɗabi’unmu suna da tasiri gaske a gare shi.
elements.questionHint1: Shin za ka iya ɓata wa kayan aiki, na’ura, ko ƙarfin halitta rai? Wane irin halittar da wani abu ya zama don yana iya jin baƙin ciki, kuma menene wannan ke nuna game da Ruhu Mai Tsarki?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Mettal ɓernde woni jaabaari famuyankeewari — ɗum sikkina mbawka nanude, nanitnude, e nde woɓɓe ngaɗata wonnude e mo. A waawataa mettinande ɓernde sembe halinaangu: a waawataa mettinande ɓernde wulaango, walla teddungal, walla hendu. Goonɗi Pool yarfirii en mettinandaago ɓernde Ruuhu Ceniiɗo hollita Ruuhu ina wooddi ɓernde e Ɗum ina shafetoo tan no ngaɗuɗen yonki. Ɗum fawoo mo laabi nder jamɗe neɗɗo, naa’ sembe. Ɗum hollita kadi Ruuhu ina gollordi e meeɗen tafaaki hakkunde amen e maajum goonga ɗum ɓeydii maa hollita maajum.
elements.questionHint2: Mbele a waawata mettinande ɓernde kuugal, masina, walla sembe halinaangu? Ko haani wonnde wonde huunde ngam waawude nanugo mettal ɓernde, e ko ɗum hollita dow Ruuhu Ceniiɗo?

elements.text1: Wanne irin kwatance aka yi amfani da su don bayani akan Ruhu Mai Tsarki?
elements.text2: Ko woni wonne misaluuji kuutoraaɗi nder Linjiila ngam hollugo no Ruuhu Ceniiɗo wa’i?
elements.text3: What are some of the images used in the Bible to describe the Holy Spirit?

elements.passageText1: <sup>37</sup>A ranar ƙarshe ta idin, wato babbar ranar, sai Yesu ya tsaya, ya ɗaga murya ya ce, ‘Duk mai jin ƙishirwa yă zo gare ni yă sha. <sup>38</sup>Duk mai gaskatawa da ni, kamar yadda Nassi ya ce, ‘Daga zuciyarsa ne kogunan ruwan rai za su gudana.’ <sup>39</sup>’To, wannan shi ne ya faɗa game da Ruhu, wanda masu gaskatawa da shi za su karɓa, domin har yanzu ba a ba da Ruhu ba, saboda ba a ɗaukaka Yesu ba tukuna.
elements.passageText3: <sup>30</sup>A rana ta ƙarshe kuma mafi girma ta Bikin, Yesu ya tsaya ya yi magana da babbar murya ya ce, ‘Duk mai jin ƙishirwa, yă zo wurina yă sha. <sup>38</sup>Duk wanda ya gaskata da ni, kamar yadda Nassi ya ce, kogunan ruwa masu rai za su gudana daga cikinsa.’ <sup>39</sup>Da wannan yana nufin Ruhu ke nan, wanda waɗanda suka gaskata da shi za su karɓa daga baya. Har yă zuwa wannan lokaci ba a ba da Ruhu ba tukuna, da yake ba a riga an ɗaukaka Yesu ba.
elements.passageText4: <sup>37</sup>Nyalnde nde humto ngon re’ata, kayre woni nyalnde mawnde nde humto ngon. E nyalnde nden Yeesu ummii, darii, wi’i e sembe, ‘Fuu nanayɗo ɗonka wara to am mi hokkaymo ko o yarata. <sup>38</sup>Non no ɗum windiraa, ‘Koo moye kooliiɗoyam, canɗi ndiyam kokkoojam yonki waɗay ka iluki daga nder ɓernde maako.’ <sup>39</sup>’Nde Yeesu wi’i ɗu’um, dow Ruuhu Allah o metata ɗum kooliiɓemo keɓata. E ngel ɗon carel Allah hokkaayi Ruuhu muuɗum taw, ngam Yeesu teddinaaka taw.
elements.passageText5: <sup>37</sup>On the last day of the feast, the greatest day, Jesus stood up and shouted out, ‘If anyone is thirsty, let him come to me, and <sup>38</sup>let the one who believes in me drink. Just as the scripture says, ‘From within him will flow rivers of living water.’’ <sup>39</sup>(Now he said this about the Spirit, whom those who believed in him were going to receive, for the Spirit had not yet been given, because Jesus had not yet been glorified.)

elements.question1: Yesu ya yi amfani da kwatancen ruwa don bayyana Ruhu. Menene wannan kwatanci ke nuna game da abin da Ruhu ke yi a rayuwar mutum?
elements.question2: Yeesu huutori misalu ndiyam ngam hollugo Ruuhu. Ko misalu ngol hollaata dow ko Ruuhu waɗata nder yonki neɗɗo?
elements.question3: Jesus uses the image of water to describe the Spirit. What does this image suggest about what the Spirit does in a person’s life?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Ruwa yana da mahimmanci ga rayuwa — ba tare da shi ba, abubuwa masu rai suna bushewa suna mutuwa. Ta wurin bayyana Ruhu a matsayin ruwan rai da ke gudana daga cikin mutum, Yesu yana nuna cewa Ruhu ba ƙarin abu bane ga masu gaskatawa bali halartar da ke ba da rayuwa. Kwatancin ’koguna’ da ke gudana daga ciki yana kuma nuna yalwa da motsi zuwa waje — Ruhu ba ƙaramin tafki mai tsayawa bane bali tushe mai kyar da ake zubo. Yana gamsar da ƙishirwar ruhaniya mai zurfi wacce babu wani abu da zai iya biyan ta, kuma aikin sa a cikinmu ba ya dauri — yana zuba zuwa waɗanda ke kewaye da mu.
elements.questionHint1: Menene ke faruwa da mutum, tsiro, ko dabba da suka yi dogon zaman ba tare da ruwa ba — kuma idan Ruhu ya yi kama da ruwan rai, menene wannan ke nuna game da yadda yake da mahimmanci ga rayuwar ruhaniya?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Ndiyam ɗi ina tinaaki ngam yonki — to walaa ɗi, huunde fuu nde yonki e maa. E hollugo Ruuhu bana ndiyam kokkooji yonki cankitiiɗi daga nder neɗɗo, Yeesu hollita Ruuhu naa huunde jokkolel ngam goonɗinɓe, sey jokku fewndo naafata yonki. Misalu ’canɗi’ cankitiiɗi daga nder ɓernde hollita kadi heewugol e yimnugo dow — Ruuhu naa’ tafki laaɗuɗo ammaa ɗon nii source heewuɗo. O niiɓina ɗonka ruuhuuyanke ngo’o mo huunde fuu alaa mo haawtita ɗum, e kuugal maako e meeɗen darataa — o yimnoo e woɓɓe feewndo meeɗen.
elements.questionHint2: Ko waawi wonde neɗɗo, yimre, walla daabuunde to woni dogaari nder walaa ndiyam — nden to Ruuhu wa’i bana ndiyam kokkooji yonki, ko ɗum hollita dow no tinaaki ɗum ngam yonki ruuhuuyankeere?

elements.passageText1: <sup>2</sup>farat ɗaya, sai aka ji wani amo daga sama, kamar na busowar gawurtacciyar iska, ya cika duk gidan da suke zaune. <sup>3</sup>Sai waɗansu harsuna kamar na wuta suka bayyana a gare su, suna rarrabuwa, suna sassauka a kan ko wannensu.
elements.passageText3: <sup>2</sup>Ba zato ba tsammani sai aka ji motsi kamar ta babbar iska tana hurowa daga sama ta kuma cika dukan gidan da suke zaune. <sup>3</sup>Suka ga wani abin da ya yi kama da harsunan wuta, suka rarrabu suna kuma sassauka a kan kowannensu.
elements.passageText4: <sup>2</sup>Ɗon e ɗon ɓe nani iido ƴiwoyii daga dow bo hendu cembindu. Iido ngon heewi wuro ngo ɓe ngoni nder. <sup>3</sup>Sey goɗɗum nanduɗum e ɗemɗe hiite wangi. Ɗe cankitii, ɗe koɗi dow hoore koo moye maɓɓe.
elements.passageText5: <sup>2</sup>Suddenly a sound like a violent rushing wind came from heaven and filled the whole house where they were sitting. <sup>3</sup>And tongues spreading out like a fire appeared to them and came to rest on each one of them.

elements.question1: Iska da wuta su ne kwatancin da aka yi amfani da su anan. Wanne hali ne waɗannan ke nuna game da yadda Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya zo da kuma ayyukan sa?
elements.question2: Hendu e hiite woni misaluuji ɗon. Ko ɗee hollaata dow garol Ruuhu Ceniiɗo e kuuɗe maako?
elements.question3: Wind and fire are the images here. What qualities do these suggest about the Holy Spirit’s arrival and work?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Iska da wuta duka masu ƙarfi ne, ana iya ganin tasirin su, kuma ba za a iya yin iko da su gaba ɗaya ba. Iska a nan ba iska mai laushi ba ce bali amo mai yawo da ƙarfi — wanda ke nuna zuwan Ruhu ya kasance mai ƙarfi, mai ban mamaki, kuma ba za a iya ɓoyewa ba. Wuta ƙarfin tsarki ne mai ƙona abubuwa, wacce aka yi amfani da ita a cikin Tsohon Alkawari don nuna kasancewar Allah. Gaskiyar cewa harsunan wuta sun sauka a kan kowane mutum ɗaya ɗaya yana nuna cewa Ruhu ya zo ba don cika ɗaki kawai ba bali don shafar kowane mutum da kansa. Waɗannan kwatancin suna nuna Ruhu wanda zuwan sa mai ƙarfi ne, mai tsarki, ba za a iya yin watsi da shi ba, kuma mai zurfi ta fuskar mutum.
elements.questionHint1: Yi tunani game da halayen iska da wuta — duka masu ƙarfi ne, ba za a iya yin cikakken iko da su ba, kuma ana iya ganin su ta tasirin su ba ta kai tsaye ba. Menene waɗannan halayen na iya cewa game da yadda Ruhu ke aiki?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Hendu e hiite fuu ɗi ɗon ngoni e sembe, ɗi ngoni e alaamaaji maaje nder famuyankaagal, e a waawataa ndaaraade ɗi tigi ammaa njiiretee e kuuɗe maaje. Hendu ɗon naa’ hendu semɗungol ammaa iido cembindu — hollita garol Ruuhu woori e sembe, jannitinoowu, e daɗɗuɗu. Hiite woni sembe ceniingol e suuɗinoowu, noddinooɗe nder Tawreeta teeŋde e jokkondirde Allah e yimɓe. Goonɗi ɗemɗe hiite koɗi dow hoore koo moye ɓe maa footinoori hollita Ruuhu waroyaani tan ngam heewugo wuro ammaa ngam laddugo koo moye neɗɗo hoore maajum. Misaluuji ɗee hollata Ruuhu mo garol maako ina semɗi, ina ceniiɗo, a waawataa waɗugo o hakkitinoowo, e mo ina laddugo neɗɗo koo moye.
elements.questionHint2: Miijo fii alaamaaji hendu e hiite — ɗi ɗon ngoni e sembe, a waawataa nanngeede ɗi fuu, e nji’irtetee e kuuɗe maaje naa’ tigi. Ko alaamaaji ɗee maa wi’a dow no Ruuhu gollorta?

elements.text1: Ga su wa Allah ya ba Ruhu Mai Tsarki?
elements.text2: Moy Allah hokkata Ruuhu muuɗum?
elements.text3: To whom does God give His Spirit?

elements.passageText1: <sup>9</sup>Amma ku kam, ba masu zaman halin mutuntaka ba ne, masu zaman Ruhu ne, in dai har Ruhun Allah yana zaune a zuciyarku. Duk wanda ba shi da Ruhun Almasihu kuwa, ba na Almasihu ba ne.
elements.passageText3: <sup>9</sup>Ku kam, ana mulkinku ba ta wurin mutuntaka ba, sai dai ta wurin Ruhu, in Ruhun Allah yana zaune a cikinku. In kuma wani ba shi da Ruhun Kiristi, shi ba na Kiristi ba ne.
elements.passageText4: <sup>9</sup>Ammaa onon on ngaɗataa ko ɓalli mooɗon ngiɗi. On ngaɗa ko Ruuhu Allah wi’i, to ni ɗum goonga Ruuhu Allah e jooɗii nder ɓerɗe mooɗon. Koo moye to walaa Ruuhu Almasiihu:  Ruuhu Almasiihu e Ruuhu Allah fuu ɗum go’o. , naa’ Almasiihu jeyimo.
elements.passageText5: <sup>9</sup>You, however, are not in the flesh but in the Spirit, if indeed the Spirit of God lives in you. Now if anyone does not have the Spirit of Christ, this person does not belong to him.

elements.question1: A cewar Bulus, menene alamar kasancewa na Almasihu? Menene wannan ke gaya mana game da ko Ruhu yana ga wasu Kiristoci kawai?
elements.question2: Dow ko Pool wi’i, ko woni alaama jeyal Almasiihu? Ko ɗum hollaata en dow kanko Ruuhu woni ngam woɗɓe nder annabaajo’en tan naa?
elements.question3: According to Paul, what is the mark of belonging to Christ? What does this tell us about whether the Spirit is only for some Christians?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Bulus ya ce alamar kasancewa na Almasihu ita ce samun Ruhun Almasihu yana zaune a cikin ka. Sa’an nan ya faɗi saɓanin haka cikin bayyananne ƙwarai: idan kowa ba shi da Ruhu, wannan mutum ba na Almasihu ba ne. Babu tsakiyar rukuni — babu abin da ya yi kama da Bature Kiristo ba tare da Ruhu ba. Wannan yana nuna cewa Ruhu ba kyauta ta musamman ga Kiristoci masu ci gaba ko masu sadaukarwa musamman ba; ana ba shi duk masu gaskatawa a lokacin da suka zo da bangaskiya. Karɓar Ruhu ba mataki na biyu ko mataki mafi girma na rayuwar Kiristo ba ne — shi ne abin da kasancewa na Almasihu ke nufi daga farko.
elements.questionHint1: Bulus ya bayyana haka a matsayin zaɓi na ’ko/ko’ ba tare da keɓancewa ba — ko kana da Ruhu ko ba ka na Almasihu ba. Menene wannan tsarin ƙarara ke gaya maka game da ko Ruhu yana ga wasu irin Kiristoci kawai?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Pool wi’i alaama jeyal Almasiihu ko Ruuhu Almasiihu e jooɗii nder ma. O holliti kadi saɓeere ɗum e laaɓi teeŋde: to koo moye walaa Ruuhu, neɗɗo oon naa’ Almasiihu jeyii. Walaa jamɗe e ɓalli nder ɗuum — alaa ko wa’i bana Kiristaajo mo walaa Ruuhu. Ɗum hollita Ruuhu naa’ dokkal mawngal tan ngam Kiristanko’en mawɓe naa jokkondinɓe teeŋɗe; hokketee goonɗinɓe fuu nder sahaa ɓe ngaɗa goonɗinaade. Keɓugo Ruuhu naa’ laabi ɗiɗiɓo walla tekkere mawnde nder yonki Kiristaajo — ɗum woni ko jeyal Almasiihu heɓi fahin.
elements.questionHint2: Pool wi’i ɗuum bana ’ko/naa’ walaa keɓancuuji — ko woodii Ruuhu nder ma, ko alaa e Almasiihu jeyaa ma. Ko ɗuum teeŋtingo hollita dow Ruuhu Ceniiɗo hokketee Kiristanko’en ɗeɓe walla fuu?

elements.text1: Menene wasu daga cikin ayyukan Ruhu Mai Tsarki?
elements.text2: Ko keɓaten diga Allah e laawol Ruuhu muuɗum?
elements.text3: What do we receive from God through His Spirit?

elements.passageText1: <sup>8</sup>Amma za ku sami iko sa’ad da Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya sauko muku, za ku kuma zama shaiduna a Urushalima, da duk ƙasar Yahudiya, da ta Samariya, har ya zuwa iyakar duniya.
elements.passageText3: <sup>8</sup>Amma ku za ku karɓi iko sa’ad da Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya sauka a kanku; za ku kuma zama shaiduna cikin Urushalima, da kuma cikin dukan Yahudiya da Samariya, zuwa kuma iyakar duniya.
elements.passageText4: <sup>8</sup>Ammaa to Ruuhu Allah jippoyake dow mooɗon, on keɓay bawɗe, on ngartay kokkayɓe woɓɓe habaru am nder Urucaliima, e leydi Yahuudiya fuu, e leydi Samaariya, haa keerol duuniyaaru.’
elements.passageText5: <sup>8</sup>But you will receive power when the Holy Spirit has come upon you, and you will be my witnesses in Jerusalem, and in all Judea and Samaria, and to the farthest parts of the earth.

elements.question1: Menene Yesu ya yi wa’adi cewa Ruhu zai ba mu, kuma don wane dalili? Ta yaya wannan ke shafar mu a yau?
elements.question2: Ko Yeesu fodani en wonde Ruuhu hokkay en, nden ngam ko woni sabaabu maajum? No ɗum huutortee nder yonki meeɗen hannde?
elements.question3: What does Jesus promise the Spirit will give us, and for what purpose? How does that apply to us today?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Yesu ya yi wa’adi cewa Ruhu zai ba mu iko, kuma ya haɗa wannan ikon kai tsaye da manufa: kasancewa shaidu a gareshi — farawa daga wurin mu suna yaɗuwa zuwa ƙarshen duniya. Ba a ba da ikon don amfanin kai ba bali don aikin mishan. A yau, wannan wa’adi yana shafar duk masu gaskatawa. Har yanzu ana kiran mu mu kasance shaidu ga Yesu a gidajenmu, al’ummominmu, birananmu, da kuma a duniya baki ɗaya, kuma Ruhu har yanzu shi ne wanda ke ƙarfafa mu don haka. Ba tare da ikon Ruhu ba, shaida mai tasiri ba ta cikin iyawarmu; tare da shi, mutane na yau da kullun za su iya faɗi da aikata abubuwa da ke canza rayuka.
elements.questionHint1: Yesu ya haɗa kyautar ikon kai tsaye da wani takamaiman aiki — menene wannan aikin, kuma shin gaskiyar cewa ya miƙa ’zuwa ƙarshen duniya’ yana nuna an yi niyyarsa don almajiran farko kawai, ko duk mabiya Yesu?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Yeesu fodii Ruuhu hokkata en bawɗe, o jokkini bawɗe ɗe tigi e sabaabu: wonugo kokkooɓe habaru maako — daga nder meeɗen cankitinoogo haa keerol duuniyaaru. Bawɗe ɗe hokketaake ngam amfaari hoore sey ngam kuugal. Hannde, fodannde nden ina tonngoo goonɗinɓe fuu. Har ɗoon en ina noddetee wonugo kokkooɓe habaru Yeesu nder suudu meeɗen, e duniyaaru meeɗen, e ngaluuje meeɗen, e duuniyaaru boo, e Ruuhu ɗoon kadi ko kanko naɗata en ngam ɗuum. To walaa bawɗe Ruuhu, kokkannde habaru nde heewi walaa en waawi; e maajum, yimɓe gooduyaɓe mbaawa haalde e waɗude ko huɓɓinta yonkuuji.
elements.questionHint2: Yeesu jokkini hokkal bawɗe tigi e kuugal cakkitiingal — ko kuugal ngal, e to ɗum yimnata ’haa keerol duuniyaaru’ hollita sosi tan ngam almajiri’en wooto, walla ngam tokkooɓe Yeesu fuu?

elements.text1: Tayaya Ruhu Mai Tsarki ke taimakon mu a matayin mu na Kiristoci?
elements.text2: No Ruuhu Ceniiɗo wallirta en bana Kiristanko’en?
elements.text3: How does the Holy Spirit help us as Christians?

elements.passageText1: <sup>7</sup>Duk da haka ina gaya muku gaskiya, zai fiye muku in tafi, domin in ban tafi ba, Mai Taimakon nan ba zai zo gare ku ba. In kuwa na tafi, zan aiko shi gare ku. <sup>8</sup>Sa’ad da kuwa ya zo zai faɗakar da duniya a kan zunubi, da adalci, da kuma hukunci. <sup>9</sup>Wato a kan zunubi, domin ba su gaskata da ni ba,
elements.passageText3: <sup>7</sup>Amma gaskiya nake gaya muku. Don amfaninku ne zan tafi. Sai ko na tafi, in ba haka ba Mai Taimakon nan ba zai zo muku ba. Amma in na tafi, zan aiko shi gare ku. <sup>8</sup>Sa’ad da ya zo kuwa, zai kā da duniya a kan zunubi da adalci da kuma hukunci, <sup>9</sup>a kan zunubi, domin mutane ba su gaskata da ni ba;
elements.passageText4: <sup>7</sup>Ammaa e mi wi’a’on goonga, ngam ɓeydaari mooɗon ndillaymi. Ngam to mi dillaayi, ɗum ɗon Ballayɗum:  Waato Ruuhu Allah.  warantaa’on. Ammaa to mi dillii, mi liloyayɗum to mooɗon. <sup>8</sup>To ɗum waroyii, ɗum hollay yimɓe duuniyaaru ɓe paamaayi boɗɗum ko woni hakke, e aadilaaku Allah, e kiita maako. <sup>9</sup>Ɓe paamaayi ko woni hakke, ngam ɓe koolaakiyam.
elements.passageText5: <sup>7</sup>But I tell you the truth, it is to your advantage that I am going away. For if I do not go away, the Advocate will not come to you, but if I go, I will send him to you. <sup>8</sup>And when he comes, he will prove the world wrong concerning sin and righteousness and judgment— <sup>9</sup>concerning sin, because they do not believe in me;
elements.note: Advocate — or, in other versions, Helper, Comforter or Counsellor — is referring to the Holy Spirit.

elements.question1: Yesu ya ce zai fi mana amfani shi ya tafi domin Mai Taimako ya zo. Me ya sa kasancewar Ruhu za a iya kiran shi ’amfani’?
elements.question2: Yeesu wi’i ɗum ɓeydaari (amfani) meeɗen to o dillii ngam Balloowo on (Advocate) wara. Ko waɗi jonde Ruuhu ɗon sifore bana ɓeydaari?
elements.question3: Jesus says it is to our ’advantage’ that He goes away so the Advocate can come. Why might the Spirit’s presence be described as an advantage?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Sa’ad da Yesu yana a duniya, kasancewar sa ta jiki yana iyakance ne ga wuri ɗaya a lokaci guda — waɗanda ke kusa da shi kawai za su iya ji shi, gani shi, ko samun taimakon sa. Ruhu, sabanin haka, ana ba shi duk masu gaskatawa ko’ina a lokaci guda. Kowane Kiristo a kowane ƙarni da kowane kusurwa na duniya yana da damar samun taimakon Ruhu, koyarwar sa, da ta’aziyyar sa — ba waɗanda suka yi arziki sun yi tafiya a hanyoyin Galili kawai ba. Ruhu kuma yana aiki daga ciki maimakon daga waje, yana tsara zukatanmu da tunaninmu ta hanyoyi da kasancewar jiki a gefenmu ba za ta iya yi ba. A wannan ma’anar, zuwan Ruhu amfani ne gaske: yana kasancewa ko’ina da yawa, ana iya samun sa da kusanci, kuma yana canza mutum da zurfi.
elements.questionHint1: Sa’ad da Yesu yana nan da jiki, mutane nawa ne za su iya kasancewa tare da shi a lokaci guda — kuma ta yaya yadda Ruhu ke kasancewa tare da masu gaskatawa ya bambanta da wannan iyaka?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Nde Yeesu woori e duuniyaaru e ɓanndu, jokkondirde maako ina taƴii e deɗɗo gootal e sahaa gooto — tan ɓe ngonɓe nanngiri mo mbaawi nanude mo, ndaaraade mo, walla wallitaade e maako. Ruuhu Ceniiɗo, saɓaare ɗuum, hokketee goonɗinɓe fuu ko’e fuu e sahaa gooto. Koo Kiristaajo nder keɓe fuu e duuniyaaru fuu ina waawi keeɓanaade wallital Ruuhu, ekkital maako, e jonde jam maako — naa’ tan ɓe joginoɓe aleeji Galili. Ruuhu kadi gollorta daga nder ɓernde meeɗen naa’ e dow meeɗen, o feewnita ɓerɗe meeɗen e miijo meeɗen no jokkordi dow meeɗen e wande yiytaaki. E ɗuum laawol, garol Ruuhu goonga ɓeydaari: o ina heewi joonugo ko’e fuu, o ina waɗi jonde yiytude, e o ina feewnita neɗɗo e hakkunde.
elements.questionHint2: Nde Yeesu woori e ɓanndu, yimɓe ɗuuɗi ɗi mbaawi wonude e mo e sahaa gooto — nden no Ruuhu jokkondirata e goonɗinɓe seerata e iyaande nden?

elements.passageText1: <sup>25</sup>’Duk wannan na faɗa muku ne tun muna tare. <sup>26</sup>Amma Mai Taimako, Ruhu Mai Tsarki, wanda Uba zai aiko da sunana, shi ne zai koya muku kome, ya kuma tuna muku duk abin da na faɗa muku.
elements.passageText3: <sup>25</sup>’Duk wannan na faɗa ne yayinda ina tare da ku. <sup>26</sup>Amma Mai Taimako, Ruhu Mai Tsarki, wanda Uba zai aiko cikin sunana, zai koya muku kome, zai kuma tuna muku duk abin da na faɗa muku.
elements.passageText4: <sup>25</sup>’Mi wi’u’on fuu ɗu’um jooni nde ngondumi e mooɗon. <sup>26</sup>Ammaa e woodi Ballayɗum, waato Ruuhu Allah ɗum Nyaako Mo Dow liloyta nder inde am. Ɗum ekkitinay’on koo ɗume, ɗum siftoranay’on fuu ko mbiimi’on.
elements.passageText5: <sup>25</sup>’I have spoken these things to you while I am still with you. <sup>26</sup>But the Advocate, the Holy Spirit, whom the Father will send in my name, will teach you everything, and will cause you to remember everything I said to you.’

elements.question1: Menene abubuwa biyu da Yesu ya ce Ruhu Mai Tsarki zai yi wa mabiyansa? Ta yaya kake ganin kowane ɗaya daga cikin waɗannan a rayuwarka?
elements.question2: Ko woni kuuɗe ɗiɗi ɗe Yeesu wi’i Ruuhu Ceniiɗo waɗanay tokkooɓe maako? No nji’irta koo gootel nder ɗee nder yonki ma’a?
elements.question3: What two things does Jesus say the Holy Spirit will do for His followers? How do you experience either of these in your own life?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Yesu ya ce Ruhu Mai Tsarki zai koya wa mabiyansa kome, kuma zai sa su tuna abin da Yesu ya ce. Waɗannan kyaututtuka biyu ne mabanbanta amma masu alaƙa: koyarwa ta ci gaba da ke buɗe fahimtar gaskiyar Allah, da kuma ƙwaƙwalwar ajiyar Ruhu wacce ke kawo kalmominYesu zuwa tunani sa’ad da ake buƙatar su. A aikace, Kiristoci da yawa suna jin wannan sa’ad da suke karanta Nassi suka sami cewa ɓangare da aka saba da shi ba da daɗewa ya zama mai rai kuma mai ma’ana ta hanyar sabuya, ko kuma sa’ad da wata aya ta zo zuwa tunanin mutum a daidai lokacin da ake buƙatar ta. Kyaututtukan biyu suna nuna Ruhu a matsayin wanda ke sa kalmar Allah ta kasance mai ma’ana da tasiri a rayuwa ta yau da kullun.
elements.questionHint1: Yesu ya ambaci abubuwa biyu daban-daban da Ruhu zai yi — shin za ka iya gane su duka biyun a aya ta 26, kuma yi tunani game da wani lokaci da ka sami kowanensu yayin da kake karanta Littafi Mai Tsarki ko fuskantarwa da halin da ke da wahala?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Yeesu wi’i Ruuhu Ceniiɗo ekkitinay tokkooɓe maako koo ɗume, e siftoranaay ɗum fuu ko Yeesu wi’i. Ɗee kuuɗe ɗiɗi nganndaama ɓe naa’ ngoodi teeŋki: ekkital cankitinoowu nagginooɗo faamu goonga Allah, e siftorankaagal Ruuhu noon nde naɗata kelmii Yeesu e miijo nde ɗum tinaami. E kuugal, Kiristanko’en ɗuuɗɓe nanjata ɗuum nde ɓe ndaaroo Kutel Ceniiɗo e heɓugo aaya nandinooɗa nde ɗum renndita e ngalɗe sabu sabu, walla nde aaya yettotoo miijo man e sahaa nde tinaami. Dokke ɗiɗi ɗee hollata Ruuhu bana mo o naɗata kalawol Allah wonunde goonga e tiɗɗinde nder yonki koo nyalnde.
elements.questionHint2: Yeesu mantini kuuɗe ɗiɗi ɗe Ruuhu waɗanay — mbele a waawi faamande ɗe ɗiɗi e aaya 26, e miijo fii sahaa gooto nder ma nde maa heɓu koo gootel ɗee nde ndaaruɗaa Kutel Ceniiɗo walla nde njolniɗaa e haala saɗtunde?

elements.passageText1: <sup>10</sup>mu ne Allah ya bayyana wa, ta wurin Ruhu, domin Ruhu shi yake fayyace kome, har ma zurfafan al’amuran Allah. <sup>11</sup>Wane ne a cikin mutane ya san tunanin wani mutum, in ba ruhun shi mutumin ba? Haka kuma ba wanda ya san tunanin Allah, sai dai Ruhun Allah. <sup>12</sup>Mu kuwa ba ruhun duniya muka samu ba, sai dai Ruhu wanda yake daga wurin Allah, domin mu fahimci abubuwan da Allah ya yi mana baiwa hannu sake. <sup>13</sup>Su ne kuwa muke sanarwa ta maganar da ba hikimar ɗan adam ce ta koyar ba, sai dai wadda Ruhu ya koyar, muna bayyana al’amura masu ruhu ga waɗanda suke na ruhu. <sup>14</sup>Mutumin da ba shi da Ruhu yakan ƙi yin na’am da al’amuran Ruhun Allah, don wauta ne a gare shi, ba kuwa zai iya fahimtarsu ba, domin ta wurin ruhu ne ake rarrabewa da su. <sup>15</sup>Mutumin da yake na ruhu kuwa yakan rarrabe da kome, shi kansa kuma ba mai jarraba shi.
elements.passageText3: <sup>10</sup>Amma Allah ya bayyana mana shi ta wurin Ruhunsa. <sup>11</sup>Wane ne a cikin mutane ya san tunanin mutum, in ba ruhun mutumin da yake cikinsa ba? Haka kuma ba wanda ya san tunanin Allah, sai dai Ruhun Allah. <sup>12</sup>Ba mu karɓi ruhun duniya ba, sai dai Ruhun da yake daga Allah, domin mu fahimci abin da Allah ya ba mu hannu sake. <sup>13</sup>Wannan shi ne abin da muke sanarwa, ba da kalmomin da muka koya ta wurin hikimar mutum ba, amma da kalmomin da Ruhu yake koyarwa, muna faɗin gaskiya ta ruhaniya da kalmomin ruhaniya. <sup>14</sup>Mutumin da ba shi da Ruhu, ba ya yarda da abubuwan da suka fita daga Ruhun Allah, domin wauta ce a gare shi. Ba kuwa zai fahimce su ba, domin ta Ruhu ne ake fahimtarsu. <sup>15</sup>Mutumin ruhaniya yakan gwada dukan abubuwa, amma shi kansa ba ya ƙarƙashin shari’ar mutum.
elements.passageText4: <sup>10</sup>Ammaa Allah hollii’enɗum laawol Ruuhu maako. Ngam Ruuhu maako e andi koo ɗume haa e sirru maako lugguɗum. <sup>11</sup>Moye nder yimɓe andata ko woni nder ɓernde neɗɗo to naa’ neɗɗo on? Non maa, walaa anduɗo nyumo Allah sey ni Ruuhu Allah. <sup>12</sup>Ruuhu ɗum keɓuɗen, naa’ to duuniyaaru ɗum ƴiwoyi; to Allah ɗum ƴiwoyi, ngam anden caahu ɗum o hokki’en. <sup>13</sup>E min meta dow ɗu’um naa’ nder haala ka faamu neɗɗo ekkitata, sey ni nder haala ka Ruuhu Allah ekkitinimin. E min ekkitina gooduɓe Ruuhu Allah dow goonga Allah. <sup>14</sup>Neɗɗo mo walaa Ruuhu Allah, o jaɓataa ko ƴiwoyi to Ruuhu Allah, ngam to maako ɗum haaŋoore. O waawataa o faamaɗum ngam o walaa Ruuhu Allah. <sup>15</sup>Gooduɗo Ruuhu Allah boo waaway faamuki koo ɗume ko Ruuhu Allah ekkitata. Ammaa mo walaa Ruuhu Allah faamataa nyumo gooduɗo Ruuhu Allah.
elements.passageText5: <sup>10</sup>God has revealed these things to us by the Spirit, for the Spirit searches all things, even the deep things of God. <sup>11</sup>For who among men knows the things of a man except the man’s spirit within him? So too, no one knows the things of God except the Spirit of God. <sup>12</sup>Now we have not received the spirit of the world, but the Spirit who is from God, so that we may know the things that are freely given to us by God. <sup>13</sup>And we speak about these things, not with words taught us by human wisdom, but with those taught by the Spirit, explaining spiritual things to spiritual people. <sup>14</sup>Now the unbeliever does not receive the things of the Spirit of God, for they are foolishness to him. And he cannot understand them, because they are spiritually discerned. <sup>15</sup>The one who is spiritual discerns all things, yet he himself is understood by no one.

elements.question1: A cewar Bulus, wanne musamman aiki ne Ruhu ke yi wajen taimakon mu mu fahimci Allah da kalmar sa?
elements.question2: Dow ko Pool wi’i, ko woni darnde Ruuhu nder wallugo en faamugo Allah e haala maako?
elements.question3: According to Paul, what unique role does the Spirit play in helping us understand God and His word?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Bulus yana gardama cewa kamar yadda ruhin mutum kawai ne ya san abin da ke gudana a ciki sa gaskiya, haka Ruhun Allah kawai ya san al’amuran Allah da zurfi. Wannan yana nufin cewa fahimtar gaskiya game da Allah da kalmar sa ba za a cimma ta ta hanyar hankali ko nazarin ɗan adam kawai ba — tana buƙatar hasken Ruhu. Ruhu, wanda ya san Allah daga ciki, ya bayyana waɗannan abubuwa ga masu gaskatawa. Shi ya sa Bulus ke cewa waɗanda ba su da Ruhu suna ganin al’amuran ruhaniya wauta ce: ba tare da Ruhu ba, kawai ba za a iya fahimtarsu ba. Ga Kiristo, Ruhu shi ne wanda ke sa gaskiyar Allah ta zama a fahimce ta, ta kai tsaye, da kuma mai canza mutum — yana juya kalmomi a shafi zuwa wahayi mai rai.
elements.questionHint1: Bulus ya yi kama da cewa sanin tunani na ciki na wani mutum — ruhun su kawai ne ke da damar hakan. Ta yaya ya yi amfani da wannan tsarin tunani ɗaya don tambayar ko wane ne zai iya gaskiya fahimtar al’amuran Allah?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Pool na njimatnooɗo tan neɗɗo hoore maako andata ko woni nder ɓernde maako — ruuhu maako tan ina waawi ɗuum. Non maa, walaa anduɗo nyumo Allah sey ni Ruuhu Allah. Ɗum hollita goonga faamo e Allah e haala maako ronkataako e faamu neɗɗo tan walla dow nazarankagal tan — ɗum sikkina hollital Ruuhu. Ruuhu, anduɗo Allah e nder maako, o hollitta ɗee kuuɗe goonɗinɓe. Saɓaare nden Pool wi’i yimɓe mo Ruuhu walaa ndaaran kuuɗe ruuhuuyankeeje bana haaŋoore: to walaa Ruuhu, a waawataa faamaade ɗe tan. Ngam Kiristaajo, Ruuhu ko kanko waɗata goonga Allah heɓtoraade, laddeede, e feewniteede — o muɗɗitora kelmii dow lahal ngam wahiyu nde yonki.
elements.questionHint2: Pool huutori misalu dow sanugo miijo nder ɓernde neɗɗo — ruuhu maako tan ina waawi ɗuum. No o huutori laawol ngol gootel ngam faamo ko moye goonga waawi andude huunde Allah?

elements.passageText1: <sup>26</sup>Haka kuma Ruhu yake yi mana taimako a kan gajiyawarmu, domin ba mu ma san abin da ya kamata mu roƙa ba, amma Ruhu da kansa yana yi mana roƙo da nishe-nishen da ba su hurtuwa.
elements.passageText3: <sup>26</sup>Haka nan ma, Ruhu yana taimakonmu cikin rashin ƙarfinmu. Ba mu san abin da ya kamata mu roƙa cikin addu’a ba, amma Ruhu kansa yana roƙo a madadinmu da nishe-nishen da kalmomi ba sa iya bayyanawa.
elements.passageText4: <sup>26</sup>Non maa, Ruuhu Allah e walla’en to tampuɗen. Ngam en andaa no haani ngaɗiren do’aare, ammaa Ruuhu Allah e hoore maajum e toroo Allah ngam meeɗen carel ngel ndulluɗen ko mbi’eten en otta.
elements.passageText5: <sup>26</sup>In the same way, the Spirit helps us in our weakness, for we do not know how we should pray, but the Spirit himself intercedes for us with inexpressible groanings.

elements.question1: Shin ka taɓa yin gwagwarmaya don sanin yadda za ka yi addu’a ko abin da za ka roƙa? Wane ta’aziyya ne wannan aya ke bayarwa?
elements.question2: A meedii saɗteego andugo no walla ko ngulloto-ɗaa Allah? Ko woni jonde jam (de’irre) nde aayewol ngol hokkata?
elements.question3: Have you ever struggled to know how or what to pray? What comfort does this verse offer?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Yawancin Kiristoci suna fuskantar lokutan da suke ji masu kwarjini sosai, ko kuma mawuyaci, ko kuma gajiyayyu don yin addu’a — ko kawai ba su san abin da za su roƙa ba. Wannan aya tana ba da ta’aziyya ta gaske ta wurin faɗa mana cewa a daidai waɗannan lokutan, ba a bar mu mu kaɗai ba. Ruhu da kansa yana shiga yana roƙo a madadinmu, yana kawo wa Allah abin da ba za mu iya samun kalmomi don faɗin sa ba. Jumlar ’nishe-nishen da kalmomi ba sa iya bayyanawa’ tana ɗaukar waɗannan lokutan na buƙata mai zurfi da ke wuce harshe. Ta’aziyyar ba cewa addu’a ta zama sauƙi ba ce, bali gajiyawarmu a addu’a an lura da ita — Ruhu yana ɗaukar abin da ba za mu iya ɗauka ba, kuma Allah, wanda ke binciken zukatanmu, yana fahimtar gaba ɗayan abin da Ruhu ke bayyana a madadinmu.
elements.questionHint1: Bulus bai ce Ruhu na taimakon mu mu sami kalmomi mafi kyau ba — ya ce Ruhu yana roƙo lokacin da ba mu da kalmomi kwata-kwata. Menene wannan ke nufi ga rayuwar addu’arku, sanin cewa gajiyawarka a addu’a wani abu ne da Ruhu ya riga ya rufe?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Kiristanko’en ɗuuɗɓe nanjata sahaaoji nde ɓe nanjata ɓe na ko ɓe maa ngaɗa do’aare naa’ ko ɓe maa ngulloto Allah — walla tan andaa ko ɓe maa mbiya. Aayewol ngol hokkata jonde jam goonga e hollitoo en to e sahaaoji ɗen tigi, en kottataako yimɓe meeɗen. Ruuhu Allah e hoore maajum e soomoo e toroo ngam meeɗen, e waɗa haawtoo Allah ko ronkiɗen kelmii ngam wi’ugo. Konngol ’carel ngel ndulluɗen ko mbi’eten en otta’ nannda e sahaaoji tampuɗe ɗe mbertata hakkunde haala. Jonde jam nden naa’ cewa do’aare heɓtinoraade sey, sey tampuɓe men e do’aare hokkoraaɓe — Ruuhu naɗa ko ronkaɗen naɗude, e Allah, anduɗo ko woni nder ɓerɗe meeɗen, faama fuu ko Ruuhu wi’ata ngam meeɗen.
elements.questionHint2: Pool wi’ataa Ruuhu wallitata en heɓde kelmii mbelembelaaji — o wi’i Ruuhu toroo Allah ngam meeɗen nde kelmii aldaa e meeɗen fuu. Ko ɗum hollita ngam yonki do’aare maa’a, andugo tampuɗe maa e do’aare ko huunde Ruuhu heɓtii taw?

elements.text1: Mu karɓi kyautar baye-baye wurin Allah ta wurin Ruhu Mai Tsarki
elements.text2: Ko woni dokke Ruuhu Ceniiɗo?
elements.text3: What are the gifts of the Spirit?

elements.passageText1: <sup>8</sup>Wani an yi masa baiwa da koyar da hikima ta wurin Ruhu, wani kuma da koyar da sani ta wurin wannan Ruhu. <sup>9</sup>Wani kuwa an yi masa baiwa da bangaskiya ta wurin Ruhun nan, wani kuma baiwar warkarwa ta wurin Ruhun nan, <sup>10</sup>wani kuma yin mu’ujizai, wani kuma annabci, wani kuma baiwar rarrabe ruhu da aljani, wani kuma iya harshe iri iri, wani kuma fassara harsuna.
elements.passageText3: <sup>8</sup>Ga wani, an ba shi saƙon hikima ta wurin Ruhu, ga wani baiwar saƙon sani ta wurin wannan Ruhu guda. <sup>9</sup>Ga wani bangaskiya ta wurin wannan Ruhu, ga wani kuma baiwar warkarwa ta wurin wannan Ruhu guda. <sup>10</sup>Ga wani yin ayyukan banmamaki, ga wani annabci, ga wani baiwar rarrabe ruhohi, ga wani baiwar magana da harsuna dabam-dabam, ga wani har wa yau iya fassarar harsuna.
elements.passageText4: <sup>8</sup>Ruuhu ɗum, kanjum hokkata goɗɗo dokkal wolde faamu, goɗɗo boo dokkal wolde andal. <sup>9</sup>Kanjum hokkata goɗɗo dokkal hoolaaki Allah, nden goɗɗo boo dokkal yamɗitinki nyawɓe, <sup>10</sup>goɗɗo kadin dokkal waɗuki fii kayɗiniiɗum, goɗɗo waɗuki annabaaku, goɗɗo boo mbawka feerootirki hakkunde Ruuhu Allah e ginni, goɗɗo boo mbawka waɗirki do’aare ɗemɗe ɗe ɓe andaa, goɗɗo boo mbawka hokkuki ma’ana ɗemɗe ɗen.
elements.passageText5: <sup>8</sup>For to one is given a message of wisdom through the Spirit, and to another a message of knowledge by the same Spirit, <sup>9</sup>to another faith by the same Spirit, and to another gifts of healing by the one Spirit, <sup>10</sup>and to another performance of miracles, to another prophecy, and to another discernment of spirits, to another different kinds of tongues, and to another the interpretation of tongues.

elements.question1: Jera kyaututtukan da Bulus ya ambata nan. Akwai wani daga cikinsu da ya ba ka mamaki?
elements.question2: Limtu (dime) dokke ɗe Pool mantini ɗon. Ko woodi gootel nder maaje ɗon haaynii-ma?
elements.question3: List the gifts Paul mentions here. Are any of them surprising to you?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Bulus ya jera: saƙon hikima, saƙon sani, bangaskiya, baiwar warkarwa, yin mu’ujizai, annabci, rarrabe ruhohi, harsuna iri iri, da fassarar harsuna. Jerin ya haɗa abubuwa masu kama da na yau da kullun (hikima, sani, bangaskiya) da kuma waɗanda suka fi ban mamaki (mu’ujizai, harsuna, warkarwa). Mutane da yawa suna mamakin ganin ’bangaskiya’ a jerin — watakila mun ɗauka kowa yana da ita daidai gwargwado — amma Bulus yana nuna cewa wasu an ba su musamman kyautar bangaskiya mai ƙarfi ko ta musamman. Wasu kuma suna mamakin baiyan ruhaniya mafi ban mamaki, ko saboda ba su tsammanin samun su a Littafi Mai Tsarki, ko kuma saboda sun ɗauka ba a ba da su a yau.
elements.questionHint1: Dubi jerin da kyau — wanne daga cikin waɗannan kyaututtukan za ka sa ran ganin sa a kowane coci a yau, kuma akwai wani da ya fi ban mamaki ko wanda ya fi na musamman gare ka, kuma me ya sa?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Pool mantini: haala wolde faamu, haala wolde andal, hoolaaki Allah, dokkal yamɗitinki nyawɓe, waɗuki fii kayɗiniiɗum, annabaaku, feerootirki hakkunde Ruuhu Allah e ginni, do’aare e ɗemɗe ɗe ɓe andaa, e hokkuki ma’ana ɗemɗe ɗen. Limoore nden ina sikkina ko dokke nanduɗe e yonki goodaari (faamu, andal, hoolaaki) e ko mawnani e hollitii (fii kayɗiniiɗum, ɗemɗe, yamɗitinki). Yimɓe ɗuuɗɓe njaayniree ndaarugo ’hoolaaki Allah’ e limol — minen ndaaro oo nde koo moye woodi e mo daccol gootel — ammaa Pool hollita wonde woɓɓe hokketee musamman dokkal hoolaaki teeŋɗi walla sifaaɗi. Woɓɓe boo njaayniree dow dokke mawɗe ruuhuuyankeeje, ko ngam mbaaynaaki ɗe nder Kutel Ceniiɗo, ko ngam ndaartuno ɓe hokkataake hannde.
elements.questionHint2: Ndaaru limoore nden e ɓattunde — dokke ɗeye nder maaje ɗee mbaayirantaa nder dewal koo nyalnde, e woodi gooto mo haaynii ma koo mo heewani ma anniya, e sabaabu?

elements.passageText1: <sup>22</sup>Albarkar Ruhu kuwa ita ce ƙauna, da farin ciki, da salama, da haƙuri, da kirki, da nagarta, da aminci, <sup>23</sup>da tawali’u da kuma kamunkai. Masu yin irin waɗannan abubuwa, ba dama shari’a ta kama su. <sup>24</sup>Waɗanda kuwa suke su na Almasihu Yesu ne, sun gicciye halin mutuntaka da mugayen sha’awace-sha’awace iri iri. <sup>25</sup>In dai rayuwar tamu ta Ruhu ce, to, sai mu tafiyar da al’amuranmu ta wurin ikon Ruhu.
elements.passageText3: <sup>22</sup>Amma amfanin da Ruhu yake bayar shi ne ƙauna, farin ciki, salama, haƙuri, kirki, nagarta, aminci, <sup>23</sup>sauƙinkai, da kuma kamunkai. Ai, ba ruwan Doka da waɗannan abubuwa. <sup>24</sup>Waɗanda suke na Kiristi Yesu, sun gicciye mutuntaka tare da abubuwan da mutum yake marmari da kuma sha’awace-sha’awacensa. <sup>25</sup>Da yake muna rayuwa ta Ruhu ne, bari mu ci gaba da al’amuranmu ta wurin Ruhu.
elements.passageText4: <sup>22</sup>Ammaa Ruuhu Allah e wadda yidde, e welwelo, e jonde jam, e munyal, e yurmeende, e ngikku boɗɗum, e waɗuki goonga, <sup>23</sup>e leynuki hoore, e suruki hoore. Walaa dooka ganyuɗum kuuɗe ɗe’e. <sup>24</sup>Yimɓe ɓe Yeesu Almasiihu jeyi, ɓe mbarii kuuɗe kalluɗe ɗe ɓandu e fuu suunooji mayru dow gaafaangal, waato ɓe cendirii e maajum. <sup>25</sup>Nde Ruuhu Allah hokki’en yonki, en ngaɗu jonde no ɗum holliri’en.
elements.passageText5: <sup>22</sup>But the fruit of the Spirit is love, joy, peace, patience, kindness, goodness, faithfulness, <sup>23</sup>gentleness, and self-control. Against such things there is no law. <sup>24</sup>Now those who belong to Christ have crucified the flesh with its passions and desires. <sup>25</sup>If we live by the Spirit, let us also behave in accordance with the Spirit.

elements.question1: Bulus ya kira waɗannan halaye ’ɓiɓɓe’ maimakon ’kyaututtuka’. Menene wannan bambanci ke nuna game da yadda suke haɓaka a rayuwar Kiristo?
elements.question2: Pool noddi ɗee ngikkuuji ’ɓiɓɓe’ naa ’dokke’. Ko seerndi ɗum hollata dow no ɗum mawnirta nder yonki Kiristaajo?
elements.question3: Paul calls these qualities ’fruit’ rather than ’gifts’. What does that distinction suggest about how they develop in a Christian’s life?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Ana ba da kyaututtuka nan da nan kuma za a iya amfani da su nan da nan. Ɓiɓɓe, sabanin haka, yana girma a hankali — yana buƙatar lokaci, yanayi dace, da kuma kusancin mai rai da tushe. Ta wurin kiran waɗannan halaye ’ɓiɓɓen Ruhu’, Bulus yana nuna cewa ba a kunna su dare ɗaya ba bali suna haɓaka a hankali da kuma na halitta yayin da muke ci gaba da kasancewa tare da Ruhu muke kuma tafiya yadda ya nuna mana. Kamar yadda ba za ka iya tilasta ɓiɓɓe su balaga ta ƙarfin nufin kai kaɗai ba, haka ba za ka iya ƙirƙirar ƙauna, haƙuri, ko kamunkai ta ƙoƙari kawai — waɗannan sakamakon rayuwar Ruhu da ke haɓaka a cikinmu a kan lokaci.
elements.questionHint1: Yi tunani game da yadda ɓiɓɓe ke girma a bishiya — shin yana bayyana nan da nan, ko yana ɗaukar lokaci kuma ya dogara da lafiyar haɗin tsakanin reshe da bishiya? Ta yaya wannan tsari na iya zama madubi na yadda waɗannan halaye ke haɓaka a Kiristo?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Dokle ɗe hokketee e sahaa e mbaawi huutoreede e sahaa. Ɓiɓɓe, saɓaare ɗuum, mawnirta e laawol yaawndu — ɗi sikkina sahaa, laawol deeɗo, e jokkondirnde yonki e tunumki. E noddugo ngikkuuji ɗee ’ɓiɓɓe Ruuhu’, Pool hollita ɓe ngalataake e fajiri-fajiri ammaa mawnirta laawol-laawol e tan no ngaɗuɗen jookkodirnde Ruuhu e yimnugo non no o holliri’en. Bana no ronkiɗen ƴiiɓanaango ɓiɓɓe no yiɗetee e nder sembe hoore meeɗen, hono non en ronkata ƙirƙirange yidde, munyal walla suruki e kokkooje hoore meeɗen tan — ɗee woni sakaare yonki Ruuhu nde mawnirtoo e meeɗen e sahaa.
elements.questionHint2: Miijo fii no ɓiɓɓe mawnirta e yiɓɓere — mbele ɗi ngoodi e fajiri-fajiri, ko ɗi sikkina sahaa e ina tinaaki jokkondirnde deeɗo hakkunde caangu e yiɓɓere? No kuugal ngal maa waɗa misalu ngam ɓiɓɓe ngakkuuji ɗee mawnirta e Kiristaajo?

elements.text1: Don Amfani su wa Ruhu Mai Tsarki ya ba da wannan baye-baye?
elements.text2: Ngam amfaani moye dokke ɗen kokka?
elements.text3: For whose benefit are the gifts given?

elements.passageText1: <sup>7</sup>An yi wa kowanne baiwa da wani buɗi na Ruhu, don kyautata wa duka. <sup>11</sup>Dukan waɗannan Ruhu ɗaya ne da yake iza su, yake kuma rarraba wa ko wannensu yadda ya nufa.
elements.passageText3: <sup>7</sup>An ba wa kowane mutum bayyanuwar Ruhu don amfanin kowa. <sup>11</sup>Duk waɗannan aiki ne na wannan Ruhu guda, yana kuma ba da su ga kowane mutum, yadda yake so.
elements.passageText4: <sup>7</sup>Allah e hokka koo moye neɗɗo alaama kolloojum e mo woodi Ruuhu Allah ngam ɓeydaari koo moye. <sup>11</sup>Fuu fii ɗu’um ɗum kuugal Ruuhu go’otum, kanjum hokkata koo moye dokkal non no ɗum suɓiri.
elements.passageText5: <sup>7</sup>To each person the manifestation of the Spirit is given for the benefit of all. ... <sup>11</sup>It is one and the same Spirit, distributing as he decides to each person, who produces all these things.

elements.question1: Wane ne ke yanke shawara game da wane kyauta kowane mutum ya karɓa, kuma waɗannan kyaututtukan na wa a ƙarshe? Ta yaya hakan ya kamata ya tsara yadda muke amfani da kyaututtukan namu?
elements.question2: Moye suɓata dokkal ngal koo moye heɓata, nden ngam moye dokke ɗen ngoni? No ɗum haani feewnitirgo laawol ngol min kuutortee dokke meeɗen?
elements.question3: Who decides which gifts each person receives, and who are they ultimately for? How should that shape the way we use our gifts?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Bulus ya ce shi ne Ruhu ke yanke shawara game da wane kyauta kowane mutum ya karɓa — zaɓin sa ne mai iko, ba namu mu roƙa ko zaɓa ba. Kuma aya ta 7 ta bayyana a sarari cewa kowane kyauta an ba shi ’don amfanin kowa’, ba don martaba ta mutum ɗaya ko amfanin mai shi kai kaɗai ba. Wannan ya kamata ya tsara yadda muke amfani da kyaututtukan namu da gaske: idan Ruhu ya zaɓe su don amfanin al’umma, to ajiye su, amfani da su don ɗaukar hankalin mutane, ko kuma ƙin amfani da su kwata-kwata, kuskure ne na cika manufarsu. An aminta mana da kyaututtukan namu don wasu — tsarin amana ne, ba mallakar mutum ɗaya ba.
elements.questionHint1: Aya ta 7 ta ce ana ba da kyaututtuka ’don amfanin kowa’ — don haka idan ana amfani da kyautar da farko don sa mutum ya zama mai ban sha’awa ko ya ji daɗi, shin wannan ya dace da manufar da Bulus ya bayyana anan?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Pool wi’i ko Ruuhu suɓata dokkal ngal koo moye keɓata — ɗum suɓannde maako mo sembe, naa’ ɗum meeɗen ngulloto walla suɓiroto. E aaya 7 hollita laaɓi yimɓe fuu dokkal hokketee ’ngam ɓeydaari koo moye’, naa’ ngam teddinidii walla amfaari hoore gooto. Ɗum haani feewnita no min kuutortee dokke meeɗen teeŋde: to Ruuhu suɓi ɗe ngam amfaari dewal, e suuɗugo ɗe, kuuturugo ɗe ngam faamaande neɗɗo, walla jaɓugo kuuturugo ɗe, woni ronkugo haaɓinde anniya maaje. Dokke meeɗen njokkorinaa men e waɗere ngam woɓɓe — ɗum woni gardiinankaagal, naa’ jeyaagal.
elements.questionHint2: Aaya 7 wi’i dokke ɗen hokketee ’ngam ɓeydaari koo moye’ — to dokkal kuutortee dow fijo maa hollugo neɗɗo ina haaɓi walla ina welweli, mbele ɗum ina jokkii e anniya Pool yantini ɗon?

elements.text1: Menene maƙasudin ko bamban dalilin Ruhu Mai Tsarki?
elements.text2: Ko woni anniya cakkitiiɗo mo Ruuhu Ceniiɗo?
elements.text3: What is the Holy Spirit’s ultimate purpose?

elements.passageText1: <sup>14</sup>Zai ɗaukaka ni, domin zai ɗauko daga cikin abin da yake nawa ya sanar da ku.
elements.passageText3: <sup>14</sup>Zai kawo ɗaukaka gare ni ta wurin ɗaukan abin da yake nawa, ya bayyana muku.
elements.passageText4: <sup>14</sup>Ruuhu ɗum hoccay ko mbiimi ɗum wi’a’onka, non ɗum hollirta teddungal am.
elements.passageText5: <sup>14</sup>He will glorify me, because he will receive from me what is mine and will tell it to you.

elements.question1: Menene Yesu ya ce manufar Ruhu ta ƙarshe take? Ta yaya wannan ke taimakon mu mu gane ko wani abu aikin Ruhu ne da gaske?
elements.question2: Ko Yeesu wi’i woni anniya Ruuhu on cakkitiiɗo? No ɗum wallirta en kistinaade to goɗɗum woni kuugal Ruuhu goonga?
elements.question3: What does Jesus say the Spirit’s ultimate purpose is? How does this help us evaluate whether something is genuinely the Spirit’s work?
elements.answerPlaceholder: Answer the question from the passage
elements.sampleAnswer1: Yesu ya ce manufar Ruhu ta ƙarshe ita ce ɗaukaka shi — ɗaukar abin da na Yesu ya sanar da shi. Ruhu bai ja hankalin mutane ga kansa ba ko kuma ya inganta manufarsa ta kansa; yana nuna kai tsaye ga Yesu. Wannan yana ba mu gwaji mai amfani don kimanta ko wani abu aikin Ruhu ne da gaske: shin yana ɗaukaka Yesu, ko kuma yana ɗaukaka wani abu — mutum, ƙwarewa, ko cibiyar? Inda Ruhu ke aiki da gaske, Yesu yana zama mafi mahimmanci, an san shi a sarari, kuma ana ƙaunar sa da zurfi. Sabanin haka, inda kulawa ta kaurace daga Yesu, alama ce ta yin hankali.
elements.questionHint1: Idan manufar Ruhu da aka faɗa ita ce ɗaukaka Yesu, wane tambaya za ka yi game da koyarwa, ƙwarewa, ko motsi don gwada ko aikin Ruhu ne da gaske?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Yeesu wi’i anniya Ruuhu cakkitiiɗo ko ɗaukaka mo — keɓugo ko Yeesu jeyi e hollitoo. Ruuhu ŋabbataa hakkunde en dow hoore maako walla iilata anniya maako hoore; o hollita tigi e Yeesu. Ɗum hokkata en gwagwaro naafatundu ngam kisinirde to huunde woni goonga kuugal Ruuhu: mbele ɗum ɗaukaka Yeesu, ko ɗaukaka ko — neɗɗo, hunnde heɓtortee, walla cibiyel? To Ruuhu gollorta goonga, Yeesu hono mawnii, nji’irtee e laaɓi, e ɓeydii yiddoo. Saɓaare noon, to nanngirde yimnoto daga Yeesu, ɗum hollata yirwaade hakkitinoowu.
elements.questionHint2: To anniya Ruuhu bi’irtaanoo ko ɗaukaka Yeesu, ko tambari ngari ma ngam kisinirde ekkital, hunnde heɓtortee, walla laawol waawi goonga kuugal Ruuhu?

elements.question: What comes to mind when you hear the word ’Trinity’? Think about it before tapping ’Find out’.
elements.answer: Many people find the Trinity confusing — even Christians. The word itself doesn’t appear in the Bible, which can add to the uncertainty. What the Bible does teach is that there is one God, who exists as three persons: Father, Son, and Holy Spirit. These three are distinct — they are not simply three ’modes’ or masks that God wears at different times — yet they are one God, not three. The Trinity is not a contradiction, but it is a mystery beyond full human understanding. What we can say is that the Father, Son, and Holy Spirit share the same divine nature and work together in everything God does.

elements.text1: Gaskiya al’amari
elements.text2: Goongaaji Mawɗi
elements.text3: Key truths

elements.text1:
Ruhu Mai Tsarki Allah ne, Ya kasance ɗaya daga ciki hanyoyi uku da Allah ya baiyana kan sa

’...haka sai ku je ku almajirtar da dukkan al’ummai, kuna yi musu baftisma da sunan Uba, da Ɗa, da Ruhu Mai Tsarki…’

Matiyu 28:19

An ba duk masu ba da gaskiya Ruhu Mai Tsarki, domin nuna cewar su mutane ne na Allah.

’Ya zaɓe mu, ya keɓe mu tare da hatimce mu a matsayin na sa, ya kuma aje Ruhunsa acikin zuciyar mu, don tabbatar mana da abubuwa masu zuwa.’

2 Korantiyawa 1:21b-22
elements.text2:
Ruuhu Ceniiɗo ko neɗɗo, kanko woni tatiraajo nder njaaku Allah.

’...Nden kam, njehee ngonaa njannginooɓe yimɓe leƴƴi fuu, mbaton ɓe batisinaaɗo nder innde Baaba e Ɓii e Ruuhu Ceniiɗo...’ — Macay 28:19

Ruuhu Ceniiɗo hokkama goonɗinɓe fuu, ngam hollugo ɓe ngoni yimɓe Allah.

’Kanko kadi o fiilanii en, o fawii dow meeɗen alaama kanko jeyi en, o fawii kadi Ruuhu maako nder ɓerɗe meeɗen bana ran (deposit), goonɗinoojum ko warata.’ — 2 Korintinko’en 1:21b-22
elements.text3:
The Holy Spirit is a person, the third person of the Godhead.

’...Therefore go and make disciples of all nations, baptising them in the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit...’ — Matthew 28:19

The Holy Spirit has been given to all believers, to show that they are God’s people.

’He anointed us, set his seal of ownership on us, and put his Spirit in our hearts as a deposit, guaranteeing what is to come.’ — 2 Corinthians 1:21b-22

elements.text1: Abubuwa tunani akai
elements.text2: Fii numtugo
elements.text3: To think about

elements.question1: Acikin baye-bayen wace baiwa ce Allah ya baka? Shin ka/ki na amfani da wannan baye-baye don kyautatawa ikkilisiya? (Idan kana buƙatar domin gane baiwar ka/ki, za ka/ki iya zantawa da ɗan’uwa mai bi ko shugabanin ikkilisiya)
elements.question2: Dokke ɗeye a miijoto Allah hokki ma? A ɗon kuutora ɗe ngam ko wooɗi e dewal (ekklisiya)? (To a ɗon yiɗi wallitaare ngam andugo dokke ma, woldu e soobaajo mo goonɗinɗo koo ardiiɗo dewal.)
elements.question3: What gifts do you think God has given you? Are you using them for the good of the church? (If you need help in identifying your gifts, speak to a Christian friend or church leader.)

elements.question1: Ko akwai ’ɓiɓɓen Ruhu’ (duba Galatiyawa 5:22-23) wanda ba ka/ki gani shaidar su a rayuwar ka/ki?
elements.question2: E woodi ’ɓiɓɓe Ruuhu’ (nduubi Galatiyanko’en 5:22-23) ɗe nganlaa nder yonki ma’a?
elements.question3: Are there any ’fruits of the Spirit’ (see Galatians 5:22-23) which are not evident in your life?
