elements.question3: What two things does Paul say are uniquely ’one’ according to this passage? What role does Jesus fulfil between God and humanity?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Bulus ya ce Allah ɗaya ne kuma matsakanci ɗaya ne tsakanin Allah da mutane. Don haka abubuwan ’ɗaya’ guda biyu su ne Allah kansa da kuma mai shiga tsakani — Almasihu Yesu. Yesu yana cika rawar matsakanci ko mai shiga tsakani: wanda ke tsayawa tsakanin ɓangarori biyu ya kawo su tare. Yana da cancanta ta musamman don wannan saboda shi da kansa mutum ne, duk da haka ya ba da kansa fansa saboda kowa. Ba wanda ke yin wannan aikin — ba shugabannin addini ba, ba kyawawan ayyukanmu ba, Almasihu kaɗai.
elements.questionHint1: Mai shiga tsakani ko matsakanci yana tsayawa tsakanin ɓangarori biyu — wa ne ɓangarorin biyu a nan, kuma Yesu yana yin me don kawo su tare?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Bulus wi’i Allah o go’oto, nden ciryootirɗo hakkunde Allah e yimɓe o go’oto. Ɗiɗi ’go’oti’ ɗii ndoni fuu Allah hoore maako e ciryootirɗo — Yeesu Almasiihu. Yeesu waɗi kuugal ciryootirɗo koo matsakanciwal: ɗum woni mo daritoowo hakkunde ɗiɗi farnde, o wallitoyde ɓe nder pocce. Kanko e gooto waɗanii ɗum timmude ngam kanko hoore maako neɗɗo, kadi o hokkii hoore maako rimɗinki yimɓe fuu. Walaa mo ɓannginii cukaɗirgol nde’e — naa jiidiiɓe dewal, naa golle ɓurɗe moƴƴugo, Almasiihu tan.
elements.questionHint2: Ciryootirɗo koo matsakanciwal daritiima hakkunde ɗiɗi farnde — ɗume ngoni ɗiɗi farnde ɗii ɗoo, nden ɗume Yeesu waɗata ngam wallitugol ɓe nder pocce?
elements.sampleAnswer3: Paul says there is one God and one intermediary between God and humanity. The two ’ones’ are therefore God himself and the mediator — Christ Jesus. Jesus fulfils the role of intermediary or mediator: the one who stands between two parties and brings them together. He is uniquely qualified for this because he is himself human, yet also gave himself as a ransom for all. No one else bridges that gap — not religious leaders, not our own good works, only Christ.
elements.questionHint3: An intermediary or mediator stands between two parties — who are the two parties here, and what does Jesus do to bring them together?

elements.question: What do you think of when you hear the word salvation?
elements.answer: ’Salvation’ can sound like old-fashioned religious language, but it simply means rescue. The Bible uses it to describe what God has done for us through Jesus — rescuing us from the consequences of sin (God’s judgement) and restoring us to a right relationship with Him. Salvation is not something we achieve through being good enough; it is something God has done and freely offers to us. Receiving it requires a response, which is what Study 8 explores.

elements.text1: Gaskiya al’amari
elements.text2: Gongaaji mawɗi
elements.text3: Key truths

elements.text1:
Yesu ne kaɗai hanya

’Yesu ya ce masa, ‘Ni ne hanya, ni ne gaskiya, ni ne kuma rai. Ba mai zuwa wurin Uba sai ta wurina.’’

Yahaya 14:6
elements.text2:
Yeesu woni laawol go’otol yahugo haa Allah.

’Yeesu jaabii mo, ‘Min woni laawol, e gonga, e yonki. Walaa jahowo haa Baaba to wonaa bee am...’’ — Yahaya 14:6
elements.text3:
Jesus is the only way to God.

’Jesus answered, ‘I am the way and the truth and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me...’ — John 14:6

elements.text1:
Duk waɗan da suka ba da gaskiya ga Ɗan Allah za su samu rai na har abada: Duk waɗan da suka ƙi ba da gaskiya za su fuskanci hukunci.

’Saboda ƙaunar da Allah ya yi wa duniya har ya ba da makaɗaicin Ɗansa, domin duk wanda ya gaskata da shi kada ya hallaka, sai dai ya sami rai madawwami. Duk wanda ya gaskata da shi, ba za a yi masa hukunci ba. Wanda kuwa bai ba da gaskiya ba, an riga an yi masa hukunci, domin bai gaskata da sunan makaɗaicin Ɗan Allah ba.’

Yahaya 3:16, 18
elements.text2:
Fuu kooliiɓe Ɓii Allah njaɓay yonki ngiinaaka: fuu ɓe koolaaki taƴanteere kiita.

’Ngam Allah yiɗi dunyaaru haa o hokki Ɓii maako bajjo, ngam koo moye kooliiɗo mo halkataake, ammaa heɓay yonki ngiinaaka. Kooliiɗo mo taƴantaake kiita, ammaa mo hoolaakimo o yaadake o taƴanaama kiita, ngam o hoolaaki Ɓiɗɗo Allah bajjo.’ — Yahaya 3:16, 18
elements.text3:
All who believe in God’s Son will have eternal life: all who do not believe will be condemned.

’For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son, that whoever believes in him shall not perish but have eternal life. Whoever believes in him is not condemned, but whoever does not believe stands condemned already because they have not believed in the name of God’s one and only Son.’ — John 3:16, 18

elements.text1: Abubuwa tunani akai
elements.text2: Kujuuje numtol
elements.text3: To think about

elements.question1: Idan abokanka/ƙawayenki sun amince Allah zai karɓe su ne saboda suna iƙirarin suna da gaskiya sun kuma taikamawa wasu, mai za ka/ki faɗawa irin waɗan nan abokai/ƙawaye
elements.question2: To higo’en ma ɗon numta Allah jaɓay ɓe ngam ɓe mboolidiyay gonga kadi ɓe mballiyay yimɓe, ɗume mbi’ata ɓe?
elements.question3: If your friends feel certain that God will accept them because they have always been honest and helped others, what would you say to them?

elements.question1: Wacce amsa zaka/ki ba abokanka/ƙawayenki wanɗan da suke ɗauka cewar saboda ƙaunar da Allah ya ke da ita ba zai yiwu ya ɗorawa wani hukunci na har abada ba (sai dai ko kuma wani gawurtaccen mai laifi.)?
elements.question2: No njaabata higo mo numtata Allah yiɗeere waɗataa jukkere halkere haa abada dow koo moye (to wonaa kadi dow bakkanteeɓe mawɓe sanne)?
elements.question3: How would you answer a friend who argues that a God of love would not inflict everlasting punishment on anyone (except, perhaps, the very worst criminals)?

chapters.chapterTitle3: God’s Remedy: 2 The Resurrection and Ascension

elements.text1: Allah Uba ya tashi Yesu daga matattu. Ma su bi ba mataccen malami suke bautawa ba amma Mai Ceto da Ubangijin da aka tashe shi daga matattu.
elements.text2: Gaafaangal wonaa joofande taalol ngol. Allah Baaba ummini Yeesu daga maayɓe — nden ɗum waylitii kowuuji fuu. Kereeti’en mawnintaako moodibbo maayɗo; ɓe mawnintaa ko Kisinoowo ummitiiɗo e Joomiraawo yonki. Nder jande nde’e en ɗon tina ko ummital e ƴeental ngal fassitiri bee me’en.
elements.text3: The cross is not the end of the story. God the Father raised Jesus from the dead — and that changes everything. Christians do not worship a dead teacher; they worship a risen Saviour and living Lord. In this study we explore what the resurrection and ascension mean for us.

elements.text1: Menene ya sa tashin Yesu daga matattu ya ke da matuƙar mahimmanci
elements.text2: Ngam ɗume ummital Yeesu daga maayɓe mari nafu sanne?
elements.text3: Why is the raising of Jesus from the dead (His resurrection) so important?

elements.passageText1: <sup>14</sup>In kuwa ba a ta da Almasihu ba, to, ashe, wa’azinmu a banza ne, bangaskiyarku kuma banza ce. <sup>17</sup>Luk 24.34 ;  Mat 28.16 , 17 ;  Mar 16.14 ;  Luk 24.36 ;  Yah 20.19 <sup>18</sup>Ashe, waɗanda suka yi barci a kan su na Almasihu, sun hallaka ke nan. <sup>19</sup>Da begenmu ga Almasihu domin wannan rai ne kaɗai, ai, da mun fi kowa zama abin tausayi.
elements.passageText3: <sup>14</sup>In ba a tashe Kiristi ba kuwa, ai, wa’azinmu, da bangaskiyarku banza ne. <sup>17</sup>In kuwa ba a tashe Kiristi ba, bangaskiyarku a banza take, ya zama har yanzu kuna cikin zunubanku ke nan. <sup>18</sup>Ashe, waɗanda suka yi barci a cikin Kiristi ma sun hallaka ke nan. <sup>19</sup>In a wannan rayuwar ce kaɗai muke da bege cikin Kiristi, mun zama abin tausayi fiye da dukan mutane.
elements.passageText4: <sup>14</sup>To boo Almasiihu ummaaki daga mayde, too, wa’ajinki amin wartii meere, nden hoolaare mooɗon wartii meere. <sup>17</sup>Daa Almasiihu umminaaka, too, hoolaare mooɗon wartii meere, nden haa jooni on ngondi e hakke mooɗon, <sup>18</sup>nden mayɓe e koolii Almasiihu kalkii won ɗon. <sup>19</sup>To ni ngam jonde duuniyaaru ndu’u tan ngaɗeten kammunde dow Almasiihu, en ɓurii koo moye wartuki ɓe ɗum yurminanta.
elements.passageText5: <sup>14</sup>And if Christ has not been raised, then our preaching is futile and your faith is empty. . . <sup>17</sup>And if Christ has not been raised, your faith is useless; you are still in your sins. <sup>18</sup>Furthermore, those who have fallen asleep in Christ have also perished. <sup>19</sup>For if only in this life we have hope in Christ, we should be pitied more than anyone.

elements.question1: Bulus ya jera wasu abubuwa da da dole sun kasance gaskiya idan Almasihu bai tashi ba. Menene su? Menene wannan ke gaya maka game da yadda tashin matattu yake da mahimmanci ga bangaskiyar Kiristo?
elements.question2: Bulus ɗon limta kujuuje ɗuɗɗe ngal laatoto gonga to Almasiihu ummaaki. Ɗume ngoni ɗum? Ɗume ɗum holli ma dow no ummital man woni hakkunde hoolaare Kereeti’en?
elements.question3: Paul lists several things that would be true if Christ had not been raised. What are they? What does this tell you about how central the resurrection is to the Christian faith?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Bulus ya jera sakamako guda huɗu masu lalacewa da dole su biyo bayan ba a tashe Almasihu ba: wa’azin Kiristo zai kasance a banza da komai; bangaskiya za ta zama marar amfani; masu gaskatawa har yanzu za su kasance cikin zunubansu — ba a gafarta musu ba; kuma waɗanda suka riga mutu a matsayin Kiristoci da sun ɓace kawai. Ya ƙara da na biyar: idan begenmu ga Almasihu ya ƙare da wannan rai, to Kiristoci sun cancanci tausayi fiye da kowa, tun da sun bar da yawa don komai. Ganin su duka tare, waɗannan suna nuna cewa tashin matattu ba ƙaramin ɓangare ba ne bali asasin bangaskiyar Kiristo. Ba tare da shi ba, komai kuma — gafara, rai madawwami, begen gobe — yana rugujewa.
elements.questionHint1: Bulus yana amfani da kalmar ’idan’ a kai a kai — gwada lissafo kowane sakamakon da ya ambata ɗaya bayan ɗaya, sa’an nan tambayi kanka me suke da shi duk ɗaya.
elements.sampleAnswer2: Pool limtii kujuuje nayi ɓurɗe lalitaade ngal kaɗtotoo to Almasiihu ummaaki daga mayde: wa’ajanki Kereeti’en wattaa meere; hoolaare wattaa meere; goonɗinɓe haa jooni ngondoto e junuubi maɓɓe — forgaaka ɓe; e mayɓe ɓe Almasiihu jeyi kalkitoto ɗon. O ɓeydi joowɓal: to kammunde meeɗen dow Almasiihu hantotoo e duuniyaaru nduu tan, en ɓuriranoo ɓe fuu yurminaaɓe, tawi en njoppinii ɗuɗɗe ngam meere. E ngu’uji fuu gonki, ɗee hollata ummital maayɓe wonaa huunde yoornde tan ammaa asli hoolaare Kereeti’en. To walaa ɗum, koo ɗume — ɓittaare junuubi, yonki abadaaru, kammunde maa dow yeeso — wartiraa.
elements.questionHint2: Pool huutoroo konngol ’to’ e teeŋki teeŋki — moto limtude kujuuje koo wootere o mantini ɗon e dow nde moɗɗo, nden tambin hooyre maa ko ngoni e mum fuu gootel.

elements.text1: Wacce shaida akwai akan cewar Yesu ya tashi daga matattu?
elements.text2: Ɗume woni seedamku dow Yeesu ummitake daga maayɓe?
elements.text3: What proof is there that Jesus rose from the dead?

elements.passageText1: <sup>1</sup>A ranar farko ta mako kuwa, da asussuba, suka je wurin kabarin da kayan ƙanshi da suka shirya. <sup>2</sup>Sai suka tarar an mirgine dutsen daga kabarin. <sup>3</sup>Suka shiga ciki, amma ba su sami jikin Ubangiji ba. <sup>4</sup>Tun suna cikin damuwa da abin, sai kawai ga waɗansu mutum biyu a tsaye kusa da su, saye da tufafi masu ƙyalƙyali. <sup>5</sup>Don tsoro, matan suka sunkuyar da kansu ƙasa. Mutanen suka ce musu, "Don me kuke neman rayayye a cikin matattu? <sup>6</sup># Mat 16.21 ;  17.22 , 23 ;  20.18 , 19 ;  Mar 8.31 ;  9.31 ;  10.33 , 34 ;  Luk 9.22 ;  18.31-33  Ai, ba ya nan, ya tashi. Ku tuna yadda ya gaya muku tun yana Galili <sup>7</sup>cewa, ‘Lalle ne a ba da Ɗan Mutum ga mutane masu zunubi, a gicciye shi, a rana ta uku kuma ya tashi’."
elements.passageText3: <sup>1</sup>Da sassafe a ranar farko ta mako, matan suka je kabarin, da kayan ƙanshin da suka shirya. <sup>2</sup>Suka iske an riga an gungurar da dutsen daga bakin kabarin. <sup>3</sup>Amma da suka shiga ciki, ba su iske jikin Ubangiji Yesu ba. <sup>4</sup>Yayinda suna cikin tunani a kan wannan, nan take, ga waɗansu mutum biyu tsaye kusa da su, sanye da kaya masu ƙyalli, kamar walƙiya. <sup>5</sup>A cikin tsoro, matan suka fāɗi da fuskokinsu a ƙasa, amma mutanen suka ce musu, "Me ya sa kuke neman mai rai a cikin matattu? <sup>6</sup>Ba ya nan, ya tashi! Ku tuna yadda ya gaya muku tun yana tare da ku a Galili cewa, <sup>7</sup>’Dole a ba da Ɗan Mutum ga hannun masu zunubi, a kuma gicciye shi, a rana ta uku kuma a tashe shi.’   "
elements.passageText4: <sup>1</sup>Nyalnde Alal subaka, rewɓe ɓen kocci nebbam uroojam ɗam ɓe mo’’ini ngam ɓe moytana ɓandu maako, ɓe njahi yenaande nden. <sup>2</sup>Ɓe tawi hayre nden tallitaama daga dammugal yenaande nden. <sup>3</sup>Ammaa nde ɓe natti, ɓe tawaayi ɓandu Yeesu. <sup>4</sup>E ɓe nder wannaare # 24.4:  Koo boo ɓillaare.  dow fii ɗum, sey bo maƴƴere ɓe ngi’i worɓe ɗiɗo e ndarii haade maɓɓe. E ɓe ɓornii kolte daneeje tar. <sup>5</sup>Kulol nangiɓe, sey ɓe njani ɓe kippii. Worɓe ɓen mbi’iɓe, "Ngam ɗume ɗaɓɓitoton mo yonki nder mayɓe? <sup>6</sup>O walaa ɗo’o. Ɗum umminiimo daga mayde! Ciftoree ko o wi’unoo’on ko o wondunoo e mooɗon nder leydi Galiili. <sup>7</sup>O wi’ii, ‘Doole Ɓii Neɗɗo hokkitiree nder juuɗe kalluɓe, o waree dow gaafaangal, nden o ummoo nder nyalnde tatawre.’ " # Maat 16.21; 17.22,23; 20.18,19; Mar 8.31; 9.31; 10.33,34; Luk 9.22; 18.31‑33.
elements.passageText5: <sup>1</sup>Now on the first day of the week, at early dawn, the women went to the tomb, taking the aromatic spices they had prepared. <sup>2</sup>They found that the stone had been rolled away from the tomb, <sup>3</sup>but when they went in, they did not find the body of the Lord Jesus. <sup>4</sup>While they were perplexed about this, suddenly two men stood beside them in gleaming clothing. <sup>5</sup>The women were terribly frightened and bowed their faces to the ground, but the men said to them, ‘Why do you look for the living among the dead? <sup>6</sup>He is not here, but has been raised! Remember how he told you, while he was still in Galilee, <sup>7</sup>that the Son of Man must be delivered into the hands of sinful men, and be crucified, and on the third day rise again.’

elements.question1: Menene matan suka tarar da su a kabarin? Menene mutanen biyu suka gaya musu, kuma menene Yesu da kansa ya yi annabci akai?
elements.question2: Ɗume rewɓe ɓen tawi nde ɓe njotti haa yenaande? Ɗume worɓe ɗiɗo ɓen mbi’i ɓe, nden ɗume Yeesu e hoore mum aalkinoo?
elements.question3: What did the women find when they arrived at the tomb? What do the two men tell them, and what had Jesus himself predicted?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Matan sun zo da tsammanin shafa wani jiki, amma sun tarar dutsen an riga an mirgine shi kuma kabarin ya kasance wofi — jikin Yesu ya tafi. Mutum biyu sanye da tufafin ƙyalƙyali sun bayyana suka gaya musu a sarari: ‘Ba ya nan, ya tashi.’ Sa’an nan suka tunatar da matan wani abin da Yesu da kansa ya yi annabci akai tun yana Galili — cewa za a ba da Ɗan Mutum, a gicciye shi, kuma zai tashi a rana ta uku. Kabarin da ya wofi saboda haka ba asiri da za a bayana ba ne; ya cika annabcin da Yesu da kansa ya yi.
elements.questionHint1: Mutanen biyu sun yi wa matan wata tambaya mai ƙarfi — menene tambayar ’Don me kuke neman rayayye a cikin matattu?’ ke nuna game da wanda suke tsammanin Yesu shi ne?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Rewɓe ɓen njahi e kammunde moytanade ɓandu, ammaa ɓe tawi hayre tallitaama taw e yenaande nden wonnde foɓɓunde — ɓandu Yeesu yehi. Worɓe ɗiɗo ɓornii kolte ɓurɗe daneede ngooɗade wangii mbi’iɓe e laaɓi: ‘O walaa ɗo’o, umminiima daga mayde.’ Nden ɓe ciftorinii rewɓe ɓen ko Yeesu hoore mum aalkinoo e ley Galiili — wonki Ɓii Neɗɗo hokkitoraa, waree dow gaafaangal, nden o ummoto e nyalnde tatawre. Yenaande fowɓunde sababe ɗum wonaa mbaydi faamu gonɗum; ɗum woni heewuki ko Yeesu hoore mum annabinoori.
elements.questionHint2: Worɓe ɗiɗo ɓen tambirii rewɓe ɓen tambari teeŋki — ɗume tambari ’Ngam ɗume ɗaɓɓitoton mo yonki nder mayɓe?’ hollata dow ko ɓe nuɗɗiniri Yeesu wonude?

elements.passageText1: <sup>36</sup>Suna cikin faɗar waɗannan abubuwa, sai ga Yesu da kansa tsaye a tsakiyarsu, ya ce musu, "Salama alaikun!" <sup>37</sup>Amma suka firgita, tsoro ya kama su, suka zaci fatalwa suke gani. <sup>38</sup>Sai ya ce musu, "Don me kuka firgita, kuke kuma tantama a zuciyarku? <sup>39</sup>Ku dubi hannuwana da ƙafafuna, ai, ni ne da kaina. Ku taɓa ni, ku ji, don fatalwa ba ta da nama da ƙashi, yadda kuke gani nake da su." <sup>40</sup>Da ya faɗi haka, ya nuna musu hannuwansa da ƙafafunsa. <sup>41</sup>Amma tun suna da sauran shakka saboda tsananin farin ciki da mamaki, sai ya ce musu, "Kuna da wani abinci a nan?" <sup>42</sup>Sai suka ba shi wata tsokar gasasshen kifi. <sup>43</sup>Ya kuwa karɓa, ya ci a gabansu.
elements.passageText3: <sup>36</sup>Suna cikin wannan zance, sai ga Yesu da kansa tsaye a tsakiyarsu. Sai ya ce musu,  "Salama a gare ku!" <sup>37</sup>Suka firgita, suka tsorota, suna tsammani fatalwa ce suka gani. <sup>38</sup>Sai ya ce musu,  "Don me kuke damuwa, kuke kuma shakka a zuciyarku? <sup>39</sup>Ku duba hannuwana da ƙafafuna. Ai, ni ne da kaina! Ku taɓa ni ku ji, ai, fatalwa ba ta da nama da ƙashi, yadda kuke gani nake da su." <sup>40</sup>Da ya faɗi haka, sai ya nuna musu hannuwansa da ƙafafunsa. <sup>41</sup>Kuma har yanzu, suna cikin rashin gaskatawa, saboda murna da mamaki, sai ya tambaye su,  "Kuna da abinci a nan?" <sup>42</sup>Suka ba shi ɗan gasasshen kifi, <sup>43</sup>ya karɓa ya ci a gabansu.
elements.passageText4: <sup>36</sup>E ɓe nder metuki haala kan, sey ɗon e ɗon Yeesu e hoore muuɗum wangi darii caka maɓɓe. O wi’iɓe, "E mi silminoo. Jam wonda e mooɗon." <sup>37</sup>Ɓerɗe maɓɓe taƴi, ɓe kammii ginnol ɓe ngi’i. <sup>38</sup>Ammaa o wi’iɓe, "Ɗume wanni’on? Ngam ɗume ngaɗoton seko nder ɓerɗe mooɗon? <sup>39</sup>Ndaaree juuɗe am e koyɗe am, ɗum min e hoore am. Meemeeyam nanon, ay ginnol walaa ɓandu e ƴi’e no ngiiruɗonyam." <sup>40</sup>Nde o wi’i non, o holliɓe juuɗe maako e koyɗe maako. <sup>41</sup>Ɓe njaɓaayi ɗum goonga ngam belɗum e hayɗinki. Sey o wi’iɓe, "On ngoodi goɗɗum ko nyaametee ɗo’o?" <sup>42</sup>Sey ɓe kokkimo tayre lingu njuɗaangu, <sup>43</sup>o hoccingu o nyaami yeeso maɓɓe.
elements.passageText5: <sup>36</sup>While they were saying these things, Jesus himself stood among them and said to them, ‘Peace be with you.’ <sup>37</sup>But they were startled and terrified, thinking they saw a spirit. <sup>38</sup>Then he said to them, ‘Why are you frightened, and why do doubts arise in your hearts? <sup>39</sup>Look at my hands and my feet; it’s me myself! Touch me and see; a spirit does not have flesh and bones like you see I have.’ <sup>40</sup>And when he had said this, he showed them his hands and his feet. <sup>41</sup>Now while they still could not believe it because of their joy and were amazing themselves, he said to them, ‘Do you have anything here to eat?’ <sup>42</sup>So they gave him a piece of broiled fish, <sup>43</sup>and he took it and ate it in their presence.

elements.question1: Ta yaya Yesu ya nuna wa almajiran cewar shi ba fatalwa ko wahayi ba ne? Wanne bayanin da ke cikin wannan labari ya nuna cewar tashin matattu ya kasance ta jiki?
elements.question2: No Yeesu holliri tokkuɓe mum o wonaa ginnol koo wahami? Ɗume nder habaru o ɗon holla wonki ummital man bee ɓandu woni?
elements.question3: How does Jesus demonstrate to the disciples that he is not a ghost or a vision? What details in this account suggest the resurrection was physical and bodily?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Yesu ya kula da ɗaukarinsu cewar shi ruhu ne kai tsaye: ya gayyace su su dubi su kuma su taɓa hannuwansa da ƙafafunsa, kuma ya faɗi a sarari cewa ’fatalwa ba ta da nama da ƙashi kamar yadda kuke gani nake da su.’ Ya nuna musu raunukan sa na jiki. Sa’an nan, don kawar da shakku duk wanda ya rage, ya roƙi abinci ya ci wata tsokar gasasshen kifi a gabansu. Fatalwowi ba su ci abinci. Kowane bayani — jikin da za a taɓa, raunukan da za a gani, ikon ci abinci — yana ƙarfafa cewa wannan tashin jiki ne na gaske, ba wahayi, ruɗar hankali, ko bayyanar ruhu ba.
elements.questionHint1: Yesu ya ba almajiran hanyoyi uku daban-daban don tabbatar cewa yana nan da jiki — shin za ka iya gane kowane ɗayansu, kuma me ya sa kowace irin shaida ta yi muhimmanci?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Yeesu haɓɓini tummude maɓɓe wonude ginnol tigi: o noddinii ɓe ndaarude e meemeede juuɗe maako e koyɗe maako, o wi’ii e laaɓi ’ginnol walaa ɓandu e ƴi’e no ngiiruɗonyam.’ O holliɓe ɓuuye maako ɗi ɓandu. Gaɗa, ngam lombitaago seko koo mogo heɓi, o tambirii nyaamdu o nyaami tayre lingu yeeso maɓɓe. Ginnaaji nyaamataa. Koo haala gootel — ɓandu naattinaaɗum, ɓuuye nji’iraaɗe, bawɗe nyaamugo nyaamdu — hollata ummital ngal wonii goonga e ɓandu, wonaa wahami, koo wayɗum mawɗum haali, koo holloore ruuhu.
elements.questionHint2: Yeesu hokki tokkuɓe mo laabi tati seerɗi ngam tabbitugo o ɗon ɓanndi — mbele a waawi faamande koo gootel, nden ngam ɗume koo iri seedamku naafi?

elements.passageText1: <sup>19</sup>A ran nan da magariba, ranar farko ta mako, ƙofofin ɗakin da almajiran suke ciki na kulle don tsoron Yahudawa, sai ga Yesu ya zo ya tsaya a tsaka, ya ce musu, "Salama alaikun!" <sup>20</sup>Da ya faɗi haka, ya nuna musu hannuwansa da kwiɓinsa. Sai almajiran suka yi farin ciki da ganin Ubangiji.
elements.passageText3: <sup>19</sup>Da Yamman ranar farko ta mako, sa’ad da almajiran suna tare, ƙofofi kuma suna a kulle saboda tsoron Yahudawa, sai ga Yesu ya zo ya tsaya a tsakiyarsu ya ce,  "Salama tă kasance tare da ku!" <sup>20</sup>Bayan ya faɗa haka, sai ya nuna musu hannuwansa da gefensa. Sai almajiran suka yi farin ciki ƙwarai da suka ga Ubangiji.
elements.passageText4: <sup>19</sup>Ɗum nyalnde Alal. Nde naange hiiri, tokkuɓe Yeesu kawriti, ɓe maɓɓi dammugal ngam e ɓe kula ardiiɓe Yahuudanko’en. Ɗon e ɗon Yeesu wangi darii caka maɓɓe, wi’i, "E mi silminoo. Jam wonda e mooɗon." <sup>20</sup>Gaɗa o wi’i non, o holliɓe juuɗe maako e becce maako. Sey tokkuɓemo nani belɗum naa’ seɗɗa nde ɓe ngi’imo.
elements.passageText5: <sup>19</sup>On the evening of that day, the first day of the week, the disciples had gathered together and locked the doors of the place because they were afraid of the Jewish leaders. Jesus came and stood among them and said to them, ‘Peace be with you.’ <sup>20</sup>When he had said this, he showed them his hands and his side. Then the disciples rejoiced when they saw the Lord.

elements.question1: Almajiran sun kasance a ɓoye a bayan ƙofofin da aka kulle saboda tsoro. Ta yaya halin zuciyarsu ya canza sa’ad da Yesu ya bayyana? Wanne muhimmanci kake gani a nuna musu raunukansa?
elements.question2: Tokkuɓe ɓen ɗon cuuɗoo gaɗa dammuɗe maɓɓaaɗe ngam kulol. No ɓerɗe maɓɓe waylitiri nde Yeesu wangi? Nafe ɗume ngi’uɗa nder hollaago maɓɓe ɓuuye maako?
elements.question3: The disciples were hiding behind locked doors in fear. How did their emotional state change when Jesus appeared? What significance do you see in him showing them his wounds?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Sauyin ya yi ban mamaki: daga tsoro — su ɓoye a bayan ƙofofin da aka kulle, suna fargabar kamawa — zuwa farin ciki, kawai saboda sun ga Ubangiji. Sauyin ya kasance nan da nan kuma cikakke. Game da raunukan: Yesu bai bayyana da jiki mai ɗaukaka ba wanda babu alamar gicciye a gare shi. Ya nuna musu hannuwansa da gefensa — alamar ƙusa da mashi. Wannan ya tabbatar da asalinsa ba tare da wata shakka ba (wannan shi ne Yesun da aka gicciye), kuma yana nuna cewa tashin matattu bai goge abin da ya sha wahala ba. Raunukansa alamu na har abada ne na sadaukarwarsa.
elements.questionHint1: Yi tunani game da me ya sa Yesu ya nuna raunukansa musamman maimakon kawai ya yi musu magana — menene raunukan za su tabbatar da shi wanda kalmomi kaɗai ba za su iya yi ba?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Waylital ngal hayɗinki: ɓe njahi daga kulol — cuuɗugo gaɗa dammuɗe maɓɓaaɗe, ɓe kulii jangireede — haa belɗum, tan ngam ɓe ngi’i Joomiraawo. Waylital ngal waɗiima e sahaa e heewi fuu. E dow ɓuuye ɗen: Yeesu wangaaki e ɓandu ɓurngu teddude ngal walaa alaama gaafaangal. O holliɓe juuɗe maako e becce maako — alaamaaji ɗi ɓooli e makkari ngadditi. Ɗum seeditii seedam maako to walaa seko (ɗum Yeesu mo waraama nder gaafaangal), e hollita ummital maayɓe maa lominaaki tampugol maako. Ɓuuye maako alaamaaji abadaaru ngal saɗtiri maako.
elements.questionHint2: Miijo fii ngam ɗume Yeesu hollirii ɓuuye maako musamman naa’ tan wi’iɓe haala — ɗume ɓuuye ɗen maa tabbita ngal kelmii tan waawaali waɗude?

elements.passageText1: <sup>5</sup># Luk 24.34 ;  Mat 28.16 , 17 ;  Mar 16.14 ;  Luk 24.36 ;  Yah 20.19  ya kuma bayyana ga Kefas, sa’an nan ga sha biyun. <sup>6</sup>Sa’an nan ya bayyana ga ’yan’uwa fiye da ɗari biyar a lokaci guda, yawancinsu kuwa suna nan har zuwa yanzu, amma waɗansu sun yi barci. <sup>7</sup>Sa’an nan ya bayyana ga Yakubu, sa’an nan ga dukan manzanni. <sup>8</sup># A.M 9.3-6  Daga ƙarshen duka ya bayyana a gare ni, ni ma da nake kasasshe, marar cancanta.
elements.passageText3: <sup>5</sup>cewa ya bayyana ga Bitrus, sa’an nan ga Sha Biyun. <sup>6</sup>Bayan haka, ya bayyana ga fiye da ɗari biyar daga cikin ’yan’uwa a lokaci guda. Yawancinsu kuwa suna nan da rai, ko da yake waɗansu sun riga sun yi barci. <sup>7</sup>Sa’an nan ya bayyana ga Yaƙub, sa’an nan ga dukan manzannin, <sup>8</sup>a ƙarshe duka, ya bayyana a gare ni, kamar wanda an haifa a lokacin da bai kamata ba.
elements.passageText4: <sup>5</sup>o wangani Biiturus # 15.5:  Koo boo: "Keefas." , nden o wanganii lilaaɓe maako sappo e ɗiɗo. # Luk 24.34; Maat 28.16,17; Mar 16.14; Luk 24.36; Yah 20.19. <sup>6</sup>Gaɗa ɗon o wanganii tokkuɓemo ɓurɓe 500 e carel go’o. Ɗuɗɓe maɓɓe haa jooni e ɓe foofa, ammaa woɓɓe maayii. <sup>7</sup>Ɗonmaa o wanganii Yaakubu, nden fuu lilaaɓe maako. <sup>8</sup>Gaɗa maajum fuu, min maa, o wanganiiyam, koo nde e mi nandi e ɓingel danyaangel ko carel danyukingel waɗa. # KL 9.3‑6.
elements.passageText5: <sup>5</sup>and that he appeared to Cephas, then to the twelve. <sup>6</sup>Then he appeared to more than five hundred of the brothers and sisters at one time, most of whom are still alive, though some have fallen asleep. <sup>7</sup>Then he appeared to James, then to all the apostles. <sup>8</sup>Last of all, as though to one born at the wrong time, he appeared also to me.

elements.question1: Bulus ya jera jerin shaidu masu kama da suka ga Yesu da ya tashi. Wanne muhimmanci akwai a gaskiyar cewa ya ambaci mutum fiye da ɗari biyar a lokaci guda, ‘yawancinsu suna nan har yanzu’?
elements.question2: Bulus ɗon limta seedeeɓe ɗuɗɓe ngi’uɓe Yeesu ummitiɗo. Ɗume mari nafu nder o wolwi dow yimɓe ɓurɓe yimɓe 500 e wakkati go’o, ‘nduɗɓe maɓɓe haa jooni e ɓe foofa’?
elements.question3: Paul lists a range of witnesses to the risen Jesus. What is significant about the fact that he mentions over five hundred people at one time, ‘most of whom are still alive’?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Ta hanyar lura cewa yawancin waɗannan ɗari biyar suna nan har yanzu, Bulus yana ba da gayyata buɗaɗɗiya ta tabbatar da ƙararen magana. Masu karanta rubutunsa da alama da za su iya, a ka’idance, je su tambayi waɗannan shaidu da kansu. Labari da aka ƙirƙira ba zai tsira daga irin wannan bincike ba — ba a lissafa ɗari biyar shaidu masu rai don wani abu da bai faru ba. Adadin shi kansa yana kaiwa ga yuwuwar cewa ruɗar hankali ta sirri ta wani mutum ɗaya ko biyu kawai ba haka ta kasance ba; taron fiye da ɗari biyar da suka yi irin wannan ƙwarewar a lokaci guda wani nau’i na shaida ne daban baki ɗaya.
elements.questionHint1: Me ya sa Bulus ya musamman lura cewa yawancin waɗannan ɗari biyar ’suna nan har yanzu’ — menene masu karatu na farko za su iya yi da wannan bayanin?
elements.sampleAnswer2: E wolwugo woɓɓe e 500 ɓen haa jooni e ɓe foofa, Pool e nder ɗuum ina waɗa nodditaare buɗɗunde ngam tabbitugo batu ngol. Ɓe ndartotoo e wi’ude goonga, goonɗinɓe e ley mum baawi yahude tambirde seedeeɓe ɓen e hoore maɓɓe. Haala pirortaande waawaali yoɓtaade batu ngul ngaal — a limtataako 500 seedeeɓe foofiɓe dow huunde waɗaahunde. Limoore nden e hoore mum dabbata yuwuunde wayɗum keeriingam go’o walla ɗiɗo ndunngi tan; teemedere ɓurde 500 nanndi hunnde gootel e sahaa gooto ɗum woni iri seedamku goɗɗum fuu heewi.
elements.questionHint2: Ngam ɗume Pool musamman holliti woɓɓe e 500 ɓen ’haa jooni e ɓe foofa’ — ɗume ɗi ndartotoo e wi’ude goonga ɓe ley mum baawi waɗude e haala ndee?

elements.text1: Wace nasara aka samu a ta dalilin mutuwa da tashin Yesu
elements.text2: Ɗume heɓaa bee ummital man?
elements.text3: What was achieved by the resurrection?

elements.passageText1:
<sup>54</sup># Ish 25.8  Sa’ad da kuma marar ruɓa ya maye mai ruɓar nan, marar mutuwa kuma ya maye mai mutuwar nan, a sa’an nan ne fa maganar nan da take a rubuce za a cika ta, cewa, <sup>55</sup>  # 
 Yush 13.14 
  "Ke mutuwa, ina nasararki? <sup>56</sup>Ai, zunubi shi ne ƙarin mutuwa, Shari’a kuwa ita ce sanadin ƙarfin zunubi.
elements.passageText3: <sup>54</sup>Sa’ad da mai ruɓan nan ya maye marar ruɓan nan, mai mutuwa kuma ya maye marar mutuwan nan, sa’an nan ne karin maganar da yake a rubuce zai zama gaskiya cewa, "An haɗiye mutuwa cikin nasara." # 15.54  Ish 25.8 <sup>55</sup>"Ya ke mutuwa, ina nasararki? <sup>56</sup>Zunubi ne yake ba wa mutuwa dafi, Doka kuma take ba wa zunubi iko.
elements.passageText4: <sup>54</sup>Carel ngel ɓandu maayayndu nyolayndu wartiraa ɓandu ndu maayataa ndu nyolataa, ko aayaare wi’i ɗum heeway, waato, "Ɗum heɓii jaalorgal dow mayde!" # Ica 25.8. <sup>55</sup>"Mayde, to jaalorgal maaɗa? <sup>56</sup>Ngam hakke woni tooke pooɗayɗe mayde, nden bawɗe hakke to Attawra ƴiwi.
elements.passageText5: <sup>54</sup>Now when this perishable puts on the imperishable, and this mortal puts on immortality, then the saying that is written will happen: ‘Death has been swallowed up in victory.’ <sup>55</sup>’Where, O death, is your victory? Where, O death, is your sting?’ <sup>56</sup>The sting of death is sin, and the power of sin is the law.

elements.question1: Ta yaya Bulus ya bayyana abin da tashin matattu ya yi ga mutuwa? Menene ’ƙarin’ mutuwa, kuma me ya sa ta rasa ƙarfinta?
elements.question2: Noo Poolu siforta ko ummital maayɓe waɗi e maayde? Ɗume woni ’mettugal’ maayde, nden ko waɗi nde rammbi semmbe maggal?
elements.question3: How does Paul describe what the resurrection has done to death? What is the ’sting’ of death, and why has it lost its power?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Bulus ya bayyana an ’haɗiye mutuwa cikin nasara’ — ta sha kaye gaba ɗaya aka haɗiye ta. Yana zolaya mutuwa kamar maƙiyi da ya sha kaye: ‘Ina nasararki? Ina ƙarinka?’ Ƙarin mutuwa, Bulus ya bayana, shi ne zunubi — zunubi shi ne ke ba mutuwa ƙarfinta mai kashe kai, domin zunubi yana jawo hukunci. Amma Almasihu ya ringa da zunubi a gicciye. Da an ringa da zunubi kuma an cimma tashin matattu, mutuwa ta rasa ƙarfinta. Har yanzu tana iya faruwa ta jiki, amma ba ta ƙara da ikon yin hukunci na ƙarshe.
elements.questionHint1: Bulus ya gaya mana kai tsaye menene ’ƙarin’ mutuwa — da zarar ka gane shi, tambayi kanka menene cikin wannan binciken ya riga ya ringa da wannan abin da yake.
elements.sampleAnswer2: Pool siforii mayde bana ’hoccaama e jaalorgal’ — yoɓtaama fuu e suuɗinaama. O tannii mayde bana gootel ngal yoɓtaa: ‘To jaalorgal maaɗa? To mettugal maaɗa?’ Mettugal mayde, Pool fassitii, woni hakke — hakke woni ngam hokkata mayde tooke pooɗayɗe, ngam hakke waɗata kiita. Ammaa Almasiihu rindi e hakke dow gaafaangal. Nde hakke waylitiraa e ummital ngal waɗiraa, mayde rammbi semme mettugal ngal. Haa jooni waawi waɗugo e ɓandu, ammaa ɓeydaaki bawɗe wi’ude haala cakkitii walla hisnude.
elements.questionHint2: Pool wi’anoo en tigi ɗume woni ’mettugal’ maayde — caret faaminol ngol, tambin hooyre maa ɗume nder jande ndee haɗɗiti e huunde ndee jooni.

elements.passageText1: <sup>11</sup># 1Kor 3.16  In kuwa Ruhun wannan da ya ta da Yesu daga matattu yana zaune a zuciyarku, to, shi da ya ta da Almasihu Yesu daga matattu zai kuma raya jikin nan naku mai mutuwa, ta wurin Ruhunsa da yake a zaune a zuciyarku.
elements.passageText3: <sup>11</sup>In kuwa Ruhu wannan da ya tā da Yesu daga matattu yana zama a cikinku, shi wanda ya tā da Kiristi daga matattu zai ba da rai ga jikunanku masu mutuwa ta wurin Ruhunsa, wanda yake zama a cikinku.
elements.passageText4: <sup>11</sup>To Ruuhu Allah umminɗo Yeesu daga mayde e jooɗoo nder ɓerɗe mooɗon, on ɗon umminɗo Almasiihu daga mayde hokkay ɓalli mooɗon maayayɗi yonki barka Ruuhu maako jooɗiiɗum nder ɓerɗe mooɗon. # 1Kor 3.16.
elements.passageText5: <sup>11</sup>Moreover if the Spirit of the one who raised Jesus from the dead lives in you, the one who raised Christ from the dead will also make your mortal bodies alive through his Spirit who lives in you.

elements.question1: Wane alkawari Bulus ya yi wa waɗanda Ruhu yake zaune a cikinsu? Wane alaƙa ya nuna tsakanin tashin Yesu da namu?
elements.question2: Ɗume woni ahadi ndii Poolu waɗani ɓeen ɓe Ruuhu jooɗii e mumnun? Noy o haɓɓindiri ummital Yeesu e ummital meeɗen?
elements.question3: What promise does Paul make to those in whom the Spirit lives? What connection does he draw between Jesus’ resurrection and ours?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Bulus ya yi wa’adi cewa Allah ɗaya wanda ya tashe Yesu daga matattu zai kuma raya jikunan masu gaskatawa masu mutuwa — ta wurin Ruhun sa wanda yake a zaune a cikinsu. Alaƙar da ya nuna kai tsaye ne: ikon nan ɗaya, wakili ɗaya (Ruhu), da Allah ɗaya ne ke aiki. Tashin Yesu daga matattu saboda haka ba wani abin da ya faru guda ɗaya a gare shi kaɗai ba ne; shi ne tsari da kuma tabbaci na abin da ke jira duk waɗanda suke da Ruhu. Abin da ya faru da Yesu zai faru da mutanensa.
elements.questionHint1: Bulus ya bayyana Ruhu ta amfani da jumla da ke komawa ga tashin Yesu — ta yaya wannan bayani ya haɗa abin da ya faru da Yesu da kuma abin da zai faru da masu gaskatawa?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Pool fodii Allah ɗumɗum umminɗo Yeesu daga mayde hokkay ɓalli goonɗinɓe maayayɗi yonki — barka Ruuhu maako jooɗiiɗum nder mumnun maɓɓen. Haɓɓinde ngal hollirii e tigi: bawɗe ɗen go’o, wakiilu go’o (Ruuhu), e Allah go’o e ko gollorta. Ummital Yeesu sababe ɗum wonaa huunde waɗirtaande tan ngam kanko; woni mbaydi e tabbiteeki ngam ko teddirii fow ɓe jogii Ruuhu. Ko waɗi Yeesu waɗoto yimɓe maako.
elements.questionHint2: Pool siforii Ruuhu e konngol ngol neli e ko Yeesu heɓi — no siforanki ngol haɓɓindiri ko waɗi Yeesu e ko waɗoto goonɗinɓe?

elements.text1: Menene tashin matattu yake koya mana game da Allah?
elements.text2: Ɗume ummital maayɓe ekkitinta en dow Allah?
elements.text3: What does the resurrection teach us about God?

elements.passageText1: <sup>19</sup>da kuma ko mene ne girman ikonsa marar misaltuwa da yake zartarwa a gare mu, mu masu ba da gaskiya, wato zartarwar ƙarfin ikon nan nasa, <sup>20</sup># Zab 110.1  wanda ya zartar ga Almasihu sa’ad da ya tashe shi daga matattu, ya kuma ba shi wurin zama a damansa a samaniya,
elements.passageText3: <sup>19</sup>Ina addu’a ku san girman ikon Allah wanda ya wuce misali, wanda yake namu. Ikon da yake aiki a cikinmu, ɗaya ne da ikon nan <sup>20</sup>da ya tā da Kiristi daga matattu, ya kuma sa ya zauna a hannun damansa a cikin mulkin samaniya.
elements.passageText4: <sup>19</sup>Ɗonmaa, e mi waɗa do’aare andon no bawɗe maako mawɗe kuwirta nder meeɗen, enen tokkuɓe Yeesu. Bawɗe ɗen ɗe go’o e bawɗe cembiɗɗe <sup>20</sup>ɗe Allah huutiri carel ko o ummini Almasiihu daga mayde o jooɗinimo dow jooɗorgal laamu to jungo maako nyaamo ton dow. # Jab 110.1.
elements.passageText5: <sup>19</sup>and what is the incomparable greatness of his power toward us who believe, as displayed in the exercise of his immense strength. <sup>20</sup>This power he exercised in Christ when he raised him from the dead and seated him at his right hand in the heavenly realms,

elements.question1: Bulus ya ce tashin matattu yana nuna ’ikon Allah marar misaltuwa’. Menene wannan ke nufi ga masu gaskatawa? Ta yaya sanin wannan ke shafar yadda kake tunani game da Allah?
elements.question2: Poolu wi’ii ummital maayɓe ɗon holla ’manngu bawɗe’ Allah ɓurngu misal. Ɗume ɗum firi wonande goonɗinɓe? Noy annduki ɗum wonniri miilo ma dow Allah?
elements.question3: Paul says the resurrection displays God’s ’incomparable greatness’ of power. What does that mean for believers? How does knowing this affect the way you think about God?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Kalmar ’marar misaltuwa’ tana nufin babu wani abin da za a gwada shi da shi — babu mafi girman ƙarfi. Bulus kuma ya ce wannan ikon nan ɗaya ana jagorarta ga masu gaskatawa. Tashin matattu saboda haka ba kawai alama ce ta iya yin Allah a gaba ɗaya ba; nuna ne na ikon da ke aiki yana aiki don waɗanda suke gaskatawa. Game da yadda muke tunani game da Allah, wannan yana da muhimmanci: Allahin da muke dangantaka da shi ba iyakatacce ne, nisa, ko marar aiki ba. Shi ne Allah wanda ya tashi matattu, kuma wannan ƙarfi nan yana gefenmu.
elements.questionHint1: Bulus ya ce wannan ikon an jagorarta ’ga mu masu gaskatawa’ — don haka menene tashin matattu ke gaya mana ba kawai game da iya yin Allah ba, bali game da yadda yake tsaye a gefen mutanensa?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Konngol ’ɓurngu misal’ hollata walaa huunde nanataa e maajum — walaa bawɗe mawnɗe ɓurii. E Pool wi’i kadi ɗeen bawɗe ɗen tawetee e goonɗinɓe. Ummital maayɓe sababe ɗum wonaa holloore tan ngam Allah waawi waɗude e dow fuu; ɗum woni holloore bawɗe ɗe gollorata ngam ɓe nuɗɗinii. Dow no miijorten e Allah, ɗum nafi: Allah ngam tokkuɗen e maajum, wonaa mo ɗum taƴii, mo walaa ɓe o kewii, walla mo fowti tan. Kanko woni Allah umminɗo maayɓe, e ɗeen semme ɗen ngoni gollordi e gootel meeɗen.
elements.questionHint2: Pool wi’i bawɗe ɗen tawetee ’e meeɗen ɓe nuɗɗinii’ — ɗume ummital maayɓe wi’ata en naa’ tan ngam bawɗe Allah, ammaa e ko o haani e yimɓe maako?

elements.text1: Tayaya Yesu tashi zuwa sama?
elements.text2: Noy Yeesu yaari dow kammu?
elements.text3: How did Jesus ascend into heaven?

elements.passageText1:
<sup>9</sup>  # 
 Mar 16.19 ;  Luk 24.50 , 51   Da ya faɗi haka, suna cikin dubawa, sai aka ɗauke shi Sama, wani gajimare ya tafi da shi, ba su ƙara ganinsa ba. <sup>10</sup>Suna cikin zuba ido sama, shi kuma yana tafiya, sai ga mutum biyu tsaye kusa da su, saye da fararen tufafi. <sup>11</sup>Sai suka ce, "Ya ku mutanen Galili, don me kuke tsaye kuna duban sama? Yesun nan da aka ɗauke daga gare ku aka kai shi Sama, zai komo ne ta yadda kuka ga tafiyarsa zuwa Sama."
elements.passageText3: <sup>9</sup>Bayan ya faɗi wannan, sai aka ɗauke shi sama a idanunsu sai wani girgije ya rufe shi daga ganinsu. <sup>10</sup>Suna zuba ido a bisa, zuwa cikin sararin sama yayinda yake tafiya, nan da nan, sai ga mutane biyu saye da fararen riguna tsaye kusa da su. <sup>11</sup>Sai suka ce, "Mutanen Galili, don me kuke tsaye a nan kuna duban sararin sama? Wannan Yesu, wanda aka ɗauke daga gare ku zuwa sama, zai komo daidai yadda kuka ga ya tafi sama."
elements.passageText4: <sup>9</sup>Gaɗa o wi’ii non, o hoccaa yaaki dow. E ɓe ndaaramo haa duule cuddimo. # Mar 16.19; Luk 24.50,51. <sup>10</sup>E ɓe tijjii e ɓe ndaaramo e mo fa’i dow, sey raa worɓe ɗiɗo ɓe kolte daneeje mbangii haade maɓɓe e ndarii. <sup>11</sup>Worɓe ɓen mbi’iɓe, "Onon yimɓe Galiili, ngam ɗume ndariiɗon ɗo’o on ndaara dow? Yeesu on ɗon koccaaɗo nder mooɗon yaaki dow, o so’’oyto non no ngiiruɗon o hocciraama dow."
elements.passageText5: <sup>9</sup>After he had said this, while they were watching, he was lifted up and a cloud hid him from their sight. <sup>10</sup>As they were staring into the sky while he was going, suddenly two men in white clothing stood near them <sup>11</sup>and said, ‘Men of Galilee, why do you stand here looking up into the sky? This same Jesus who has been taken up from you into heaven will come back in the same way you saw him go into heaven.’

elements.question1: Ta yaya an bayyana tashiwar sama anan? Wane alkawari ya raka tafiyar Yesu, kuma menene wannan ke nufi ga makomar?
elements.question2: Noy yaadu dow kammu siforaa ɗon? Wanne ahadi woni e yaadu Yeesu, nden ɗume ɗum firi wonande ko yeeso?
elements.question3: How is the ascension described here? What promise accompanies Jesus’ departure, and what does that mean for the future?
elements.sampleAnswer1: An bayyana tashiwar sama a matsayin abin da aka gani, da shaidu: almajiran sun kalla yayin da aka ɗauke Yesu sama kuma wani girgije ya ɓuye shi daga ganinsu. Ba ɓacewa mai ladabi ba ne bali tafiya da a iya lura, wacce za a iya gani. Alkawarin da ya raka, wanda mutane biyu sanye da fararen tufafi suka kai, shi ne cewa ’wannan Yesun nan’ zai komo ta yadda ya tafi. Kalmar ’wannan Yesun nan’ tana da muhimmanci — ba wata ƙwararre ta daban ba, bali wanda suka san shi, wanda ya mutu ya kuma tashi. Tashiwar sama saboda haka tana nuna gaba: tafiyarsa ba ƙarshe ba ce bali tabbaci ne na komawarsa.
elements.questionHint1: Manzannin sun yi amfani da takamaiman jumlar ’wannan Yesun nan’ — me ya sa waɗannan kalmomi uku na musamman suke da muhimmanci a matsayin bayani na wanda zai komo?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Ƴeental ngal siforaa bana huunde njiiritaande, seeditaande: tokkuɓe ndaari Yeesu carel ko o hocciraa dow e duule cuddimo. Wonaa fowtude e laawol seeɗo ammaa dillugol tabbiteeki ngal waawi nji’ireede. Ahadi ngal neli e ɗum, ngal worɓe ɗiɗo ɓornii kolte daneeje horkii, woni ’Yeesu on ɗon koccaaɗo’ so’oyto non no o hocciraa. Konngol ’Yeesu on ɗon koccaaɗo’ nafi — wonaa goɗɗo seeɗo, sey ɗumɗum ɓe anndinoo, maayɗo ummitiiɗo. Ƴeental ngal sababe ɗum hollita yeeso: dillude maako wonaa joofande ammaa tabbiteeki so’oytirde maako.
elements.questionHint2: Nulɓe ɗen huutoroo konngol cakkitiingol ’Yeesu on ɗon koccaaɗo’ — ngam ɗume kelmii tati ɗii naafi musamman bana siforanki ɗumɗum so’oytoto?

elements.text1: Ina Yesu yake yanzu? Wanne iko yake da shi?
elements.text2: Toy Yeesu woni jooni? Wanne laamu o jogii?
elements.text3: Where is Jesus now? What authority does He have?

elements.passageText1: <sup>20</sup># Zab 110.1  wanda ya zartar ga Almasihu sa’ad da ya tashe shi daga matattu, ya kuma ba shi wurin zama a damansa a samaniya, <sup>21</sup>a can a birbishin dukkan sarauta da iko, da ƙarfi, da mulki, a birbishin kowane suna da za a sa, ba ma a duniyar nan kawai ba, har ma a lahira ma. <sup>22</sup># Zab 8.6 # Kol 1.18  Allah kuma ya sarayar da kome a ƙarƙashin ikon Almasihu, ya kuma ba da shi ga Ikkilisiya ya zama Kai mai mallakar abu duka.
elements.passageText3: <sup>20</sup>da ya tā da Kiristi daga matattu, ya kuma sa ya zauna a hannun damansa a cikin mulkin samaniya. <sup>21</sup>Yanzu yana mulki a kan dukan masu sarauta, da masu iko, da masu ƙarfi, da kuma masu mulki. Yana mulkin kome a wannan duniya, zai kuma yi mulkin duniya mai zuwa. <sup>22</sup>Allah ya sa kome a ƙarƙashin ikonsa, ya kuma ba shi iko a kan kome don amfanin ikkilisiya.
elements.passageText4: <sup>20</sup>ɗe Allah huutiri carel ko o ummini Almasiihu daga mayde o jooɗinimo dow jooɗorgal laamu to jungo maako nyaamo ton dow. # Jab 110.1. <sup>21</sup>Ton Yeesu laamii dow koo moye laamiiɗo, e laamu, e bawɗe, e ardiiɗo, e koo iri ɗume laamu gonɗum dow e ley, naa’ jooni tan, ammaa haa abadaa. <sup>22</sup>Allah waɗii koo ɗume ley laamu maako. O wartiriimo ardiiɗo koo ɗume e ardiiɗo kawtal tokkuɓemo. # Jab 8.6.
elements.passageText5: <sup>20</sup>This power he exercised in Christ when he raised him from the dead and seated him at his right hand in the heavenly realms, <sup>21</sup>far above every rule and authority and power and dominion and every name that is named, not only in this age but also in the one to come. <sup>22</sup>And God put all things under Christ’s feet, and he gave him to the church as head over all things,

elements.question1: Ta yaya Bulus ya bayyana matsayin Almasihu da ikonsa? Menene ke nufi cewa ’kome’ yana ƙarƙashin ƙafafunsa?
elements.question2: Noy Poolu siforta daraja Almasiihu e laamu muudum? Ɗume ’kowngal fuu’ wonuki ley koyɗe muudum firi?
elements.question3: How does Paul describe Christ’s position and authority? What does it mean that ’all things’ are under his feet?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Bulus ya bayyana Almasihu yana zaune a hannun daman Allah — wuri ne na girma da iko na ƙoli — kuma yana sama sosai da kowace irin ikon da za a yi tunanin ta: kowace sarauta, iko, mulki, da kowace sunan da ke wanzu, a wannan zamani da kuma a zamani mai zuwa. Hoton ’kome a ƙarƙashin ƙafafunsa’ zanen mulki cikakke ne — babu wani abu da yake wajen mulkinsa. Ga masu gaskatawa, wannan yana nufin wanda shine shugabansu da ceto nasu yana da ikon ƙoli akan kome da ke iya barazana musu.
elements.questionHint1: Bulus ya tara jerin iko da Almasihu ya sanya a saman su — menene ka ji yana ƙoƙarin isar da shi ta amfani da irin wannan jerin mai yawa maimakon kawai ya ce ’sama da komai’?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Pool siforii Almasiihu jooɗiiɗo to jungo nyaamo Allah — woni goɗɗorgal teddungal e bawɗe mawɗe — e ɓuri sanne dow koo moye bawɗe naatintaake e miijo: koo moye laamuɗo, laamu, bawɗe, ardiiɗo, e koo suudu innde gonɗo, naa’ jooni tan ammaa haa abadaa. Mbaydi ’koo ɗume ley koyɗe maako’ woni mbaydi laamu ɓuri fuu — walaa huunde woni e dow laamu maako. Ngam goonɗinɓe, ɗum firi ɗumɗum woni hooreejo e kisnoowo maɓɓe woni e maajum bawɗe ɓurɗe fuu ngam dow koo ɗume naatinta ɓe e kulol.
elements.questionHint2: Pool timba limoore bawɗe Almasiihu fawiraa dow maɓɓe — ɗume miijortaa o ɗon yiɗi hollugo e huuturugo limoore heewunde ndee naa’ tan wi’ude ’dow koo ɗume’?

elements.passageText1: <sup>22</sup>wanda ya tafi Sama, yake dama ga Allah kuma, mala’iku da manyan mala’iku da masu iko suna binsa.
elements.passageText3: <sup>22</sup>wanda ya tafi sama, yana kuma a hannun dama na Allah, mala’iku, mulkoki da kuma masu iko suna masa biyayya.
elements.passageText4: <sup>22</sup>Yeesu yahi dow, e mo jooɗii to jungo Allah nyaamo, e mo laamoo malaa’ika’en, e gooduɓe laamu, e gooduɓe bawɗe.
elements.passageText5: <sup>22</sup>who went into heaven and is at the right hand of God with angels and authorities and powers subject to him.

elements.question1: Menene Bitrus ya ƙara wa hoton namu na matsayin Almasihu yanzu? Menene ke nufi ga masu gaskatawa cewa wanda ke roƙon Allah a madadinsu yana da wannan ikon?
elements.question2: Ɗume Bitrus ɓeydi e miilo meeɗen dow daraja Almasiihu jooni? Ɗume ɗum firi wonande goonɗinɓe annduki wonki mo ɗon ŋarana ɓe jogii laamu ngu’u?
elements.question3: What does Peter add to our picture of Christ’s current position? What does it mean for believers that the one who intercedes for them holds this authority?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Bitrus ya tabbatar da matsayin Almasihu a hannun daman Allah, kuma ya ƙara cewa mala’iku, manyan mala’iku, da masu iko duk suna binsa — dukkan tsarin ruhaniya yana ƙarƙashin umurnsa. Ga masu gaskatawa, wannan yana nufin wanda ke yin addu’a yana kuma yin roƙo a madadinsu a gaban Uba ba wanda yake da ikon iyakantacce ba; shi ne ikon ƙoli a sama. Roƙon sa a madadin mutanensa saboda haka ba marar tabbas ba ne ko mai haɗari — yana fitowa daga wanda kome ya riga ya karkashe shi.
elements.questionHint1: Idan wanda ke roƙo a madafinku ba shi da wani iko, wane bambanci ne hakan zai yi? Yanzu yi la’akari da menene ke nufi cewa yana da ikon kome — ta yaya wannan ke canza al’amura?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Bitrus tabbiti daraja Almasiihu to jungo nyaamo Allah, o ɓeydi malaa’ika’en, gooduɓe laamu, e gooduɓe bawɗe fuu ɗon e ley laamu maako — koo tintinol ruuhuuyankel woni ley amaruuji maako. Ngam goonɗinɓe, ɗum firi ɗumɗum ŋaranoo ɓe e toroo Allah ngam maɓɓe e yeeso Baaba wonaa mo walaa bawɗe seeɗa; kanko woni bawɗe mawɗe e kammu. Torooreede maako ngam yimɓe maako sababe ɗum wonaa sunnditunde koo seeɗde — ƴiwoyta to ɗumɗum koo ɗume jeyaa ley laamu maako jooni.
elements.questionHint2: To ɗumɗum toranoowo maa e dow Allah walaa bawɗe, ɗume ɗum maa waylita? Jooni miijo fii ɗume firi wonande o jogii koo bawɗe fuu — noy ɗum waylita huunde?

elements.text1: Menene Yesu yake yi a yanzu game da mabiyansa?
elements.text2: Ɗume Yeesu waɗata jooni wonande tokkuɓe mo?
elements.text3: What is Jesus doing now for His followers?

elements.passageText1: <sup>25</sup>Saboda haka, yana da ikon ceton masu kusatowa ga Allah ta wurinsa, matuƙar ceto, tun da yake kullum a raye yake saboda yi musu addu’a.
elements.passageText3: <sup>25</sup>Saboda haka ya iya ba da ceto gaba ɗaya ga masu zuwa wurin Allah ta wurinsa, gama kullum a raye yake saboda yă yi roƙo dominsu.
elements.passageText4: <sup>25</sup>Ngam non, hande e koo ndeye e mo woodi bawɗe o hisna ɓaddotooɓe Allah laawol maako. E mo waawi hisnukiɓe ngam e mo woodi yonki haa abadaa, nden e mo toroo Allah ngam maɓɓe.
elements.passageText5: <sup>25</sup>So he is able to save completely those who come to God through him, because he always lives to intercede for them.

elements.question1: Menene marubuci ya ce Yesu kullum yana yi? Ta yaya gaskiyar cewa ’kullum a raye yake’ don yin wannan ke tsara yadda kake tunani game da matsayinka a gaban Allah?
elements.question2: Ko winnduɗo on wi’i Yeesu ɗon waɗa koo ndeeye? Noy goonga wonki o ’ɗon wuuri koo ndeeye’ ngam waɗugo ɗum wonniri no miijorta dow darnde ma yeeso Allah?
elements.question3: What does the writer say Jesus is always doing? How does the fact that he ’always lives’ to do this shape how you think about your standing before God?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Marubuci ya ce Yesu kullum yana raye don roƙo a madadin waɗanda suka zo wurin Allah ta wurinsa — yana yin roƙo a madadinsu a gaban Uba kullum ba tare da tsayawa ba. Kalmar ’kullum’ tana da muhimmanci: wannan ba wata aikin da ake yi lokaci-lokaci ba ne bali na dindindin, marar tsayawa. Game da matsayinmu a gaban Allah, wannan yana ba da ta’aziyya mai zurfi: lafiyarmu ba ta dogara da daidaitonmu ko aikin namu ba. Ko da mun kasa, Yesu bai daina roƙo ba. Ana riƙe mu ba da riƙon namu ga Allah ba bali da riƙon shi a kanmu, wanda Almasihu ke kiyaye ta aikin sa mai ci gaba.
elements.questionHint1: Marubuci ya ce Yesu ’kullum yana raye’ don roƙo — menene zai ke nufi ga masu gaskatawa idan da wani lokaci da ya daina?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Winnduɗo on wi’i Yeesu e wuuri koo ndeeye ngam toroo Allah ngam ɓaddotooɓe Allah laawol maako — o ɗon toroo Allah koo ndeeye bana mo dartaa e ley Baaba. Konngol ’koo ndeeye’ nafi: wonaa kuugal waɗirtaangel caayngel ammaa kuugal diimnangel, mo dartaa sam. Dow darnde meeɗen e yeeso Allah, ɗum niiɓa sanne: ciimtol meeɗen dow Allah dawrataa e diinaaku meeɗen walla kuugal meeɗen. Koo nde tippi’en, Yeesu dartaaki toroowo. Ngoppetee en naa’ e dabbannde meeɗen dow Allah ammaa dabbannde Allah dow meeɗen, nde Almasiihu mawnina laawol kuugal maako gonɗum.
elements.questionHint2: Winnduɗo on wi’i Yeesu ’e wuuri koo ndeeye’ ngam toroo Allah — ɗume ɗum maa firi wonande goonɗinɓe to woodnoo sahaa o dartii?

elements.text1: Ba wuya a ɗauka cewar aikin Yesu ya ƙare — cewa ya mutu, ya tashi, sa’an nan ya ɗaure hannu. Amma Littafi Mai Tsarki ya koya mana cewa Yesu yana raye kuma yana aiki a matsayin Babban Firist a madadin masu bi.
elements.text2: Naa caɗum en miila kuugal Yeesu hanti — wonki o maayi, o ummaki, nden o fowti. Amma Yeesu naa’ mo walaa kuugal. Jooni maa, o ɗon ŋarana yimɓe maako yeeso Baaba. Kanko woni Limaamu meeɗen mawɗo, nden o dartataa sam.
elements.text3: It is easy to think of Jesus’ work as finished — that He died, rose, and then stepped back. But Jesus is not inactive. Right now, He is interceding for His people before the Father. He is our great High Priest, and He never stops.

elements.text1: Menene sa zuciya da begen ma su bi sakamakon tashin Yesu da komawarsa wurin Uba?
elements.text2: Ɗume immaniiɓe mbaawi jortago ngam ummital e yaadu Yeesu dow kammu?
elements.text3: What can Christians look forward to as a result of the resurrection and ascension of Jesus?

elements.passageText1: <sup>2</sup>A gun Ubana akwai wurin zama da yawa. Da ba haka ne ba, da na faɗa muku, domin zan tafi in shirya muku wuri. <sup>3</sup>In kuwa na je na shirya muku wuri, sai in dawo in kai ku wurina, domin inda nake, ku ma ku zama kuna can.
elements.passageText3: <sup>2</sup>A cikin gidan Ubana akwai wurin zama da yawa; da a ce ba haka ba ne, da na gaya muku. Za ni can don in shirya muku wuri. <sup>3</sup>In kuwa na tafi na shirya muku wuri, sai in dawo in ɗauke ku ku kasance tare da ni don ku kasance inda nake.
elements.passageText4: <sup>2</sup>Nder wuro Nyaako am Mo Dow e woodi cuuɗi ɗuɗɗi. Daa naa’ ɗum non, daa mi wi’ay’onka. Mi yahay ton mi siryanoo’on to njooɗotooɗon. <sup>3</sup>To mi yahii, mi siryanake’on to njooɗotooɗon, mi so’’oyto, mi hocca’on mi yaara’on to am, ngam onon maa njooɗooɗon to ngonmi.
elements.passageText5: <sup>2</sup>There are many dwelling places in my Father’s house. Otherwise, I would have told you, because I am going away to make ready a place for you. <sup>3</sup>And if I go and make ready a place for you, I will come again and take you to be with me, so that where I am you may be too.

elements.question1: Menene Yesu ya tafi shirya, kuma menene ya yi wa’adi zai yi? Menene ke nufi gare ka cewa manufar Yesu ita ce mabiyansa su kasance tare da shi?
elements.question2: Ɗume Yeesu yehi siryugo, nden ɗume o aadi o waɗan? Ɗume ɗum firi wonande maa wonki nufore Yeesu woni ngam tokkuɓe mo ngonda e makko?
elements.question3: What has Jesus gone to prepare, and what does he promise he will do? What does it mean to you that Jesus’ purpose is for his followers to be with him?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Yesu ya tafi shirya wuri ga mabiyansa a gidan Ubansa, kuma ya yi wa’adi cewa zai komo ya ɗauke su su kasance tare da shi — domin inda yake, su ma su kasance. Manufar tashiwar sama saboda haka ba babu ba ne bali sake haɗuwa. Makomar ƙoli da Yesu ya bayyana ba ’sama’ ta gaba ɗaya a matsayin wuri na lada ba, bali kasancewa tare da shi musamman. Yanayin sirri na wannan wa’adin — ‘domin inda nake, ku ma ku zama kuna can’ — yana nuna cewa zuciyar begen Kiristo alaƙa ce da Almasihu da kansa, ba kawai wata rana mai kyau bayan mutuwa ba.
elements.questionHint1: Yesu da alama ya yi wa’adin ’wuri mafi kyau’ — amma lura da yadda ya bayyana makomar da kalmomi masu dangantaka da mutum. Menene wannan ke gaya maka game da abin da yake daraja sosai?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Yeesu yehi ngam siryago to njooɗotooɗon ngam tokkuɓe mo nder wuro Nyaako mo, o fodii so’oytoo o hoccoo ɓe e makko — ngam onon maa njooɗooɗon to ngonmi. Anniya ƴeental ngal sababe ɗum wonaa baɗtugol ammaa so’oytiral. Makka cakkitiiɗo Yeesu siforii wonaa ’kammu’ ko na fuu bana goɗɗorgal yaafugo, sey wondude e maako musamman. Yanaaki fodannde nden — ‘ngam onon maa njooɗooɗon to ngonmi’ — hollita ɓernde kammunde Kiristaajo woni gollordi e Almasiihu hoore mum, naa’ tan hande belɗum gaɗa mayde.
elements.questionHint2: Yeesu maa fodii tan ’to belɗum’ — ammaa goo no o siforii makka nden e kelmii jokkondirɗi e neɗɗo. Ɗume ɗum wi’ata ma dow ko o ɓuri yiɗude fuu?

elements.text1: Gaskiya al’amari
elements.text2: Goongaaji mawɗi
elements.text3: Key truths

elements.text1:
Tashin Yesu daga matattu ɓangare ne mai dangane da bangaskiyar mu. Idan da Yesu bai tashi daga matattu ba, dole mu fuskanci hukunci na zunuban mu.

’Idan da Yesu bai tashi ba, to ban gaskiya ba za ta haifar da ɗa mai ido ba, da muna nan acikin zunuban mu. …Amma ga hakika an ta da Almasihu daga matattu,….’

1 Korantiyawa 15:17, 20a
elements.text2:
Ummital maayɓe woni huunde himmunde e iimaana meeɗen. To Yeesu ummaaki diga maayde, en keddotonoo e kiita junuubi meeɗen.

’To Almasiihu ummaaki, nuɗɗinki mooɗon woni meere, on ɗon keddi nder junuubi mooɗon. ...Amma jooni, Almasiihu umminama diga maayde...’ — 1 Korantiyanko’en 15:17, 20a
elements.text3:
The resurrection is an essential part of our faith. If Jesus had not been raised from the dead, we would still be condemned by our sins.

’And if Christ has not been raised, your faith is futile; you are still in your sins. … But Christ has indeed been raised from the dead...’ — 1 Corinthians 15:17, 20a

elements.text1:
Yesu yanzu yana mulki tare da Allah Uba a sama. Ya na nan a matsayi firist, yana magana da kuma roƙo ga Uban a madadin mu.

’…amma saboda yana raye har abada, ya nan a matsayin firist har matuƙa. Don haka ne ma yake iya ceton duk waɗan da suka zo wurin Allah ta wurin sa, saboda ya nan ko da yaushe shi yasa yake roƙan mana Allah’

Ibraniyawa 7:24-25
elements.text2:
Yeesu ɗon laamoo jooni bee Allah Baaba dow kammu. O ɗon huura huunde limaamu, o ɗon wolwana Baaba nden o ɗon ŋarana en.

’...amma ngam Yeesu ɗon wuuri haa abada, limaamuye maako ɗon duumoo. Ngam non, o waawi hisnuki fow ɓaddotooɓe Allah laawol makko, ngam o ɗon wuuri koo ndeeye ngam o toranoo ɓe.’ — Iburani’en 7:24-25
elements.text3:
Jesus is now ruling with God the Father in heaven. He acts as a priest, speaking and pleading with the Father on our behalf.

’...but because Jesus lives for ever, he has a permanent priesthood. Therefore he is able to save completely those who come to God through him, because he always lives to intercede for them.’ — Hebrews 7:24-25

elements.text1: Abubuwan tunani akai
elements.text2: Miijooji
elements.text3: To think about

elements.question1: Tayaya zaka/ki iya rinjayar abokinka/ƙawarki ya/ta yarda da zahirin cewar Yesu ya tashi daga matattu?
elements.question2: Noy mballirtaa soobaajo ma ngam o nuɗɗina wonki Yeesu ummaki diga maayde goonga?
elements.question3: How would you try to persuade a friend that Jesus did actually rise from the dead?

elements.question1: Acikin Littafi Mai Tsarki waɗanne ayoyi ne cikin binciken suka sanya maka/ki salama ko baka/ki ƙarfi? Menene kuma dalilin?
elements.question2: Wanne e kuyeoje hootooji Allah nder jannde ndee ɓuri hokkuugo ma ɓernde ɓuutiinde walla semmbe? Ngam ɗume?
elements.question3: Which of the Bible verses in this study gives you the greatest comfort or strength? Why?

elements.question1: Menene, idan har akwai, wanda ka/kika koya daga cikin wannan binciken da har ya kasance abin mamaki?
elements.question2: Ɗume njannguɗa nder jande ndee ko haayɗini ma sanne?
elements.question3: What, if anything, have you learned from this study which has really surprised you?

elements.text1: Cigaba da aka samu game da fasahar zamani ta ɓangaren lafiya wannan bincike na lafiya ya baiyana cewar mutum kan iya tsawaita rayuwarsa gami da inganta ta. Dukka da hakan, ƴan adam bamu da amsar babbar matsalar da muke fuskanta wanda ita ce - zunubi.
elements.text2: Lekki e karallaaji kesi kokeen kuutinirɗi mawnuɗi ngam ɓeydugo balɗe e moyyingo ngendam. Amma ɗum waawaa saahugo caɗeele meeɗen ɓurɗe lugguugo. No nji’ruɗen, gooto fuu e meeɗen waɗi hakke, nden en mbaawaa moyyingo ɗum bee kuuɗe meeɗen. Woodi, ɗume mbanneeɗen? Nder jannde nde’e en ɗon ndaara no Allah noddirta en ngam en njaabo ko o waɗani en fuu.
elements.text3: Medicine and technology have given us remarkable tools to extend and improve life. But they cannot solve our deepest problem. As we have seen, every one of us has sinned, and we cannot fix that ourselves. So what do we do? In this study we look at how God calls us to respond to everything He has done for us.

elements.text1: Menene ya sa bamu iya ceton kan mu ba daga sakamakon da zunubi zai iya haifarwa?
elements.text2: Ngam ɗume en mbaawaa hisningo ko’e meeɗen diga batte hakkeeji meeɗen?
elements.text3: Why are we unable to save ourselves from the consequences of our sin?

elements.passageText1: <sup>20</sup># Zab 143.2 ;  Gal 2.16  Ai, ba wani ɗan adam da zai sami kuɓuta ga Allah ta kiyaye ayyukan Shari’a, tun da yake ta Shari’a ne mutum yake ganin laifinsa.
elements.passageText3: <sup>20</sup>Saboda haka babu wanda Allah zai ce da shi mai adalci ta wurin kiyaye doka kawai; a maimako, ta wurin doka ne muke sane da zunubi.
elements.passageText4: <sup>20</sup>Ngam walaa neɗɗo noddeteeɗo aadiliijo yeeso Allah ngam tokkuki Attawra, ngam ko Attawra waɗata woni ɗum holla neɗɗo hakke muuɗum. # Jab 143.2; Gal 2.16.
elements.passageText5: <sup>20</sup>For no one will be declared righteous in his sight by observing the law; for through the law comes the knowledge of sin.

elements.question1: Me yasa Bulus ya ce cewa kiyaye Shari’a ba zai iya mai da mutum mai adalci a gaban Allah ba? Wane aiki ne Shari’a take yi a zahiri, bisa ga wannan aya?
elements.question2: Ngam ɗume Bulus wi’i tokkugo sariya waawaa waɗugo neɗɗo aadiliijo yeeso Allah? Ɗume woni kuugal sariya tawaangal, dow aya nde’e?
elements.question3: Why does Paul say that keeping the law cannot make a person right before God? What role does the law actually play, according to this verse?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Bulus ya faɗi a sarari cewa ba wanda Allah zai bayyana a matsayin mai adalci ta hanyar kiyaye Shari’a — domin aiki na Shari’a ba shi ne ya sa mu zama masu adalci ba, sai dai ya bayyana cewa ba haka muke ba. Tana aiki kamar madubi, tana nuna mana inda muke rasa: ta Shari’a ne sanin zunubi ke zuwa. Idan manufar Shari’a ita ce ganowa, ba warkarwa ba, to ƙoƙarin amfani da ita a matsayin hanyar samun ceto kuskuren fannonin shari’a ne. Tana iya gaya mana abin da ya kaskanta; ba zai gyara shi ba.
elements.questionHint1: Bulus ya ce Shari’a tana samar da ’sani zunubi’ — idan haka ne abin da Shari’a take ba mu, menene hakan ke gaya maka game da ko tana iya ba mu magancin matsalar zunubi?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Bulus wi’i tiiɗnde ko walaa neɗɗo noddeteeɗo aadiliijo ngam tokkuki Attawra — ngam ko Attawra waɗata woni naa’ waɗugo en aadiliiɓe, ammaa hollitde ko en aadiliiɓe ngati. O waɗa no giyeeji, hollita en ɗo min salbii: ngam Attawra on yalta anndude hakke. To nde nuunɗal Attawra woni saahugo, naa’ woƴtinude, saɗuki tokkugo ɗum laawol ngam heɓude kisndam woni jaabugo bonnum. O waawi hollitde en ko boni; o waawaa moyyinga ɗum.
elements.questionHint2: Bulus wi’i Attawra on hokkata ’anndude hakke’ — to ɗum woni ko Attawra hokkata, ɗume ɗum hollata dow ko o waawi kadi hokka en magano hakkeeji meeɗen?
elements.sampleAnswer3: Paul says plainly that no one will be declared righteous by observing the law — because the law’s function is not to make us righteous but to reveal that we are not. It acts as a mirror, showing us where we fall short: through the law comes the knowledge of sin. If the law’s purpose is diagnosis, not cure, then trying to use it as a path to salvation is a category error. It can tell us what is wrong; it cannot fix it.
elements.questionHint3: Paul says the law produces ’knowledge of sin’ — if that is what the law gives us, what does that tell you about whether it can also give us the solution?

elements.passageText1:
<sup>1</sup>  # 
 Kol 2.13 
  Ku kuma yā raya ku sa’ad da kuke matattu ta wurin laifofinku da zunubanku, <sup>2</sup>waɗanda dā kuke a ciki, kuna biye wa al’amarin duniyar nan, kuna bin sarkin masu iko a sararin sama, wato iskar nan da take zuga zuciyar kangararru a yanzu.
elements.passageText3: <sup>1</sup>Ku kam, a dā ku matattu ne saboda laifofinku da kuma zunubanku. <sup>2</sup>Kun yi rayuwa kamar yadda sauran mutanen duniya suke yi, cike da zunubi, kuna biyayya ga sarki masu ikon sarari sama, wato, ruhun nan da yanzu yake aiki a cikin masu ƙin biyayya ga Allah.
elements.passageText4: <sup>1</sup>Ndenno on nandii e yimɓe mayɓe, ngam hakkeeji mooɗon e wanyuki ko Allah wi’i. <sup>2</sup>E carel ngel on tokka ɗate duuniyaaru kalluɗe; on tokka Ceyɗan laamiiɗo ginni. Kanko woni tokkinoowo ɓerɗe ganyuɓe tokka ko Allah wi’i.
elements.passageText5: <sup>1</sup>And you were dead in your trespasses and sins, <sup>2</sup>in which you formerly lived according to this world’s present path, according to the ruler of the kingdom of the air, the spirit now at work in the sons of disobedience.

elements.question1: Bulus ya ce mun kasance ’matattu’ cikin zunubi. Ta wane hanya mutuwar ruhaniya take zama cikas ga ceton kanmu? Ta yaya wannan misalin ke canza yadda kuke tunanin yanayin mu na asali?
elements.question2: Bulus wi’i en ’mayɓe’ nder hakke. No maayde laawol ruuhu woniri haɗoore ngam hisningo ko’e meeɗen? Noy nandolaaru ndu’u mbaylirta no miijorta dow darnde meeɗen tawaangal?
elements.question3: Paul says we were ’dead’ in sins. In what sense is spiritual deadness an obstacle to saving ourselves? How does this image change the way you think about our natural condition?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Amfani da Bulus da kalmar ’matattu’ yana da niyya kuma yana da zurfin ma’ana. Mutumin da ya mutu ba zai iya inganta kansa ba, zaɓar daban, ko ba da gudummawa ga tsiransa daga waje — yana buƙatar wani daga waje ya yi aiki a kansa gaba ɗaya. Mutuwar ruhaniya saboda haka ita ce cikas gaba ɗaya ga ceton kai: muna rasa duka ƙarfin da rayuwar ruhaniya ta yin amsa ga Allah da albarkatunmu. Misalin yana ƙalubalantar ra’ayin gama-gari cewar mutane a asali su ne masu kyau kuma za su iya kaiwa ga Allah ta ƙoƙari — Bulus yana cewa farkon tunanin mu ba raunana ake ba ne amma mutuwa.
elements.questionHint1: Ka/ki yi tunani game da abin da mutumin da ya mutu na zahiri zai iya yi wa kansa — ta yaya wannan misalin ke amfani da abin da Bulus ke faɗi game da yanayin ruhaniyarmu a gaban Allah?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Nuunɗal Bulus bee wolde ’mayɓe’ ɗon woodiri e nafu mawɗo. Neɗɗo maayɗo waawaa moyyintude hoore mum, suɓaago naange, koo ballitago kisndam muuɗum — o haajana neɗɗo diga caggal waɗde e makko heɓi-heɓi. Maayde laawol ruuhu sabu majjum woni haɗoore heɓi-heɓi ngam hisningo ko’e meeɗen: min caɗake e bawɗe e yonki laawol ruuhu ngam fuɗɗude jaabore to Allah bee alaajiiji meeɗen. Nandolaaru ndu’u kadi faɗɗa miijo goma-goma wonuɗo ko yimɓe aslen ngoni booɗɓe e mbaawi kaayude haa Allah ngam taaɓal — Bulus wi’i fuɗɗoode meeɗen waayi naa’ salpugo tan ammaa maayde.
elements.questionHint2: Miijo ko neɗɗo maayɗo e lahiya waawi waɗude ngam hoore mum — no nandolaaru ndu’u jokkirta e ko Bulus wi’i dow darnde meeɗen e laawol ruuhu yeeso Allah?
elements.sampleAnswer3: Paul’s use of ’dead’ is deliberate and radical. A dead person cannot improve themselves, choose differently, or contribute to their own rescue — they need someone from outside to act on them entirely. Spiritual deadness is therefore a complete obstacle to self-salvation: we lack both the ability and the spiritual life to initiate a response to God from our own resources. The image also challenges the common assumption that people are basically good and capable of reaching God through effort — Paul says our starting point is not weakness but death.
elements.questionHint3: Think about what a physically dead person is capable of doing for themselves — how does that image apply to what Paul is saying about our spiritual condition before God?

elements.text1: Idan har ba za mu iya ceton kan mu ba, tayaya zamu iya ceton wasu?
elements.text2: To en mbaawaa hisningo ko’e meeɗen, noy mbaawreten hisneego?
elements.text3: If we cannot save ourselves, how can we be saved?

elements.passageText1: <sup>8</sup>Domin ta wurin alheri ne aka cece ku saboda bangaskiya, wannan kuwa ba ƙoƙarin kanku ba ne, baiwa ce ta Allah, <sup>9</sup>ba kuwa saboda da aikin lada ba, kada wani ya yi fariya.
elements.passageText3: <sup>8</sup>Allah ya cece ku ta wurin alheri sa’ad da kuka ba da gaskiya. Wannan kuwa ba yinku ba ne, kyauta ce daga Allah. <sup>9</sup>Ba kuwa saboda aikin lada ba, don kada wani yă ɗaga kai.
elements.passageText4: <sup>8</sup>On kisii ngam yidde Allah barka hoolaaki Yeesu. Naa’ on kisu ngam goɗɗum ɗum ngaɗɗon, ammaa ɗum caahu Allah, <sup>9</sup>naa’ ngam kuuɗe mooɗon, ngam to’ goɗɗo mawnina hoore muuɗum.
elements.passageText5: <sup>8</sup>For by grace you are saved through faith, and this is not from yourselves, it is the gift of God; <sup>9</sup>it is not from works, so that no one can boast.

elements.question1: Bulus ya ce ceto ya zo ’ta wurin alheri saboda bangaskiya’ kuma ba ’daga gare ku ba’. Menene wannan ke kawar da shi? Me yasa ya ƙara cewa ba wanda zai yi fariya?
elements.question2: Bulus wi’i kisndam woni ’ngam hinneyee laawol hoolaare’ nden ’naa’ diga onon’. Ɗume ɗum itti? Ngam ɗume o ɓeydi wonki walaa neɗɗo mawninto hoore muuɗum?
elements.question3: Paul says salvation is ’by grace through faith’ and is ’not from yourselves’. What does that rule out? Why does he add that no one can boast?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Yana kawar da duk wata gudummawar ɗan adam ga ceto — ƙoƙari, nasarar ɗabi’a, ayyukan addini, ko cancantarsa. Bulus yana bayanin haka a sarari: ba daga gare ku ba ne, ba daga ayyuka ba. Dalili da ba wanda zai yi fariya ya fito kai tsaye daga wannan: fariya tana buƙatar wata nasara ta mutum da za a nunawa. Idan ceto kyauta ta Allah gaba ɗaya ne daga farko zuwa ƙarshe, babu komai daga bangaren mu da za a yi alfahari da shi. Wannan kuma yana sa ƙasa daidai gaba ɗaya — ba wanda ya fi wani ceto domin ya yi ƙoƙari ko ya cancanta.
elements.questionHint1: Idan wani ya karɓi kyauta sannan ya yi fariya da ita, menene hakan ke bayyana game da yadda ya fahimci asalinta — kuma ta yaya hakan ke amfani da ceto?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Ɗum itti koo ko guddinaagu yimɓe nder kisndam — taaɓal, gaɗtaare e nuunɗal, tokkugo diina, koo tiindi muuɗum. Bulus ɗon faɗɗi tiiɗnde: naa’ diga onon, naa’ ngam kuuɗe. Sabu walaa neɗɗo mawninto hoore muuɗum ɗon yalta kai tsaye e ɗum: mawningo haajana taaɓal muuɗum ngam hollitde. To kisndam woni dokkal Allah heɓi-heɓi daga fuɗɗoode haa ƴettude, walaa ko diga meeɗen ngam mawninugo. Ngam majjum kadi ɗon deeɗina leydi heɓi-heɓi — walaa neɗɗo kisi nii bana goɗɗo ngam o taaɓii fota koo woti e kisndam.
elements.questionHint2: To neɗɗo heɓi dokkal nden mawnini e mum, ɗume ɗum hollata dow no o faamuɗo ɗo ɗum yalti — nden no ɗum jokkirta e kisndam?
elements.sampleAnswer3: It rules out any human contribution to salvation — effort, moral achievement, religious observance, or personal merit. Paul is explicit: it is not from yourselves, it is not from works. The reason no one can boast follows directly from that: boasting requires a personal achievement to point to. If salvation is entirely God’s gift from start to finish, there is nothing on our side to be proud of. This also levels the ground completely — no one is more saved than anyone else because they worked harder or were more deserving.
elements.questionHint3: If someone received a gift and then boasted about it, what would that reveal about how they misunderstood where it came from — and how does that apply to salvation?

elements.question: What do you think of when you hear the word grace?
elements.answer: In everyday use, ‘grace’ can mean elegance or poise. In the Bible, it means something quite different: undeserved favour. Grace is God giving us what we do not deserve and could never earn. When the Bible says we are saved ’by grace’, it means our salvation is entirely God’s gift — not a reward for our efforts, our goodness, or our religious activity. This is important because it rules out any boasting on our part, and it means that no one is ever too far gone to receive it.

elements.text1: Waɗanne abubuwa biyu muke buƙata domin samun ceto
elements.text2: Dow ko Yeesu wi’i, kuuje ɗiɗi ɗeye en noddaa waɗugo?
elements.text3: According to Jesus, what two things are we called to do?

elements.passageText1: <sup>15</sup># Mat 3.2  yana cewa, “Lokaci ya yi, Mulkin Allah ya kusato. Ku tuba, ku gaskata da bishara.”
elements.passageText3: <sup>15</sup>Yana cewa,  “Lokaci ya yi. Mulkin Allah ya yi kusa. Ku tuba, ku gaskata bishara!”
elements.passageText4: <sup>15</sup>E mo wi’a, “Carel waɗii! Laamu Allah warii haade mooɗon. Tuubee, njaɓon Habaru Belɗum.” # Maat 3.2.
elements.passageText5: <sup>15</sup>and saying, ‘The time is fulfilled and the kingdom of God is near. Repent and believe the gospel!’

elements.question1: Yesu ya buɗe hidimtarsa da umurni guda biyu. Meye su, kuma me yasa kuke tunanin ya ba su tare?
elements.question2: Yeesu fuɗɗiri kuugal muuɗum bee umrooje ɗiɗi. Ɗeye ngoni, nden ngam ɗume a miijata o hokka ɗum kawtum?
elements.question3: Jesus opens his ministry with two commands. What are they, and why do you think he gives them together?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Umurnin biyu sune: tuba da gaskata bishara. Yesu ya ba su tare domin su ne amsoshi da ba za a iya raba su ba ga wannan gaskiyar guda — zuwan Mulkin Allah. Tuba ba tare da bangaskiya ba na nufin juya daga wani abu ba tare da juya zuwa wani abu ba. Bangaskiya ba tare da tuba ba amincewa ne wanda ba ta canza yadda mutum ke rayuwa. Tare suna bayyana juyi cikakke: daga zunubi da nufin kai, zuwa ga Allah da bisharar sa cikin Yesu. Su ne bangarori biyu na amsa guda ɗaya, ba jerin matakai daban-daban ba.
elements.questionHint1: Ka/ki yi tunani game da abin da tuba ke nufi da abin da gaskata ke nufi — idan ka/ki yi ɗaya kawai daga cikin biyu, menene zai kasance gurbi a cikin amsar ka/ki?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Umrooje ɗiɗi ɗe ngoni: tuubugo e goonɗinugo Habaru Belɗum on. Yeesu ɗon hokka ɗum kawtum ngam ɓe ngoni njaabawuuji ɗe kaatonoontari e goonga gootongo — warugo Laamu Allah. Tuubugo walaa hoolaare woni ngaylito weera ko ɗume walaa ngaylito yaade to ko ɗume. Hoolaare walaa tuubugo woni goonɗinugo ngal waytaaki no neɗɗo nguurnirta. Kawtum ɗon sifanta ngaylito heɓi-heɓi: weera hakke e nii nguurnirtee e hoore meeɗen, yaade to Allah e Habaru Belɗum muuɗum e Yeesu. Ɗee ngoni ɗiɗi-ango gooto gootongo njaabowo, walaa feere kuuje ɗiɗi ceernduɗe.
elements.questionHint2: Miijo dow ko tuubugo waɗata e ko goonɗinugo waɗata — to a waɗi gooto tan diga ɗiɗi ɗuye, ko woni ko haaɗata nder jaabore ma?
elements.sampleAnswer3: The two commands are: repent and believe the gospel. Jesus gives them together because they are inseparable responses to the same reality — the arrival of God’s kingdom. Repentance without faith would be turning away from something without turning toward anything. Faith without repentance would be a belief that makes no difference to how one lives. Together they describe a complete turning: away from sin and self-direction, and toward God and his good news in Jesus. They are two sides of a single response, not a sequence of separate steps.
elements.questionHint3: Think about what repenting means and what believing means — if you only did one of the two, what would be incomplete about your response?

elements.text1: Tuba… me ake buƙata?
elements.text2: Tuubugo … ɗume woni nder muuɗum?
elements.text3: Repentance … what does it involve?

elements.passageText1: <sup>30</sup>“Domin haka ni Ubangiji Allah zan hukunta ku, ku mutanen Isra’ila, kowa gwargwadon ayyukansa. Ku tuba, ku bar laifofinku domin kada su zama muku dalilin halaka. <sup>31</sup>Ku rabu da laifofin da kuka yi mini, sa’an nan ku samo wa kanku sabuwar zuciya da sabon hali. Don me za ku mutu, ya ku jama’ar Isra’ila?
elements.passageText3: <sup>30</sup>“Saboda haka, ya gidan Isra’ila, zan hukunta ku, kowa bisa ga hanyarsa, in ji  Ubangiji  Mai Iko Duka. Ku tuba! Ku juye daga dukan laifofinku; sa’an nan zunubi ba zai zama sanadin fāɗuwarku ba. <sup>31</sup>Ku raba kanku da dukan laifofin da kuka yi, ku sami sabuwar zuciya da sabon ruhu. Don me za ku mutu, ya gidan Isra’ila?
elements.passageText5: <sup>30</sup>Therefore, I will judge each person according to his ways, O house of Israel, declares the sovereign Lord. Repent and turn from all your wicked deeds; then sin will not be an obstacle that brings you down. <sup>31</sup>Throw away all your sins you have committed and fashion yourselves a new heart and a new spirit. Why should you die, O house of Israel?’

elements.question1: Menene Allah ke kira mutanen yin sa a cikin waɗannan ayoyin? Menene ’zuciya sabuwa da ruhu sabon’ ke nuna game da abin da tuba ke ƙunsar da shi fiye da canza ɗabi’ar waje kawai?
elements.question2: Ɗume Allah noddata yimɓe ɓee ɓe waɗa nder iyeuje ɗee? Ɗume ’ɓernde hesre e ruuhu keso’ hollata dow ko tuubugo woni, naa gorel kuuɗe yaasin tan?
elements.question3: What does God call the people to do in these verses? What does ’a new heart and a new spirit’ suggest repentance involves beyond just outward behaviour?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Allah yana kiran mutane su tuba, su juya daga mugayen ayyukansu, kuma su jefar da zunubansu — harshen mai aiki wanda ya ƙunsar da canza da niyya. Amma buƙatar mafi zurfi ita ce ’zuciya sabuwa da ruhu sabon,‘ wanda ke nuna wani abu mai zurfin ma’ana fiye da gyaran ɗabi’ar waje. Zuciyan tunanin Littafi Mai Tsarki ita ce mazauni na nufi, sha’awa, da ainihi. Tuba saboda haka ta kai fiye da ɗabi’a zuwa cikin motsi da hali — canjin abin da mutum yake ƙauna da rayuwa dominsasa, ba kawai canjin abin da yake yi ba.
elements.questionHint1: Allah da yake iya cewa ’ku daina yin miyagun abubuwa’ — me yasa kuke tunanin ya zarce wannan kuma ya nemi zuciya sabuwa da ruhu sabon?
elements.sampleAnswer2: Allah noddata yimɓe ɓee ɓe tuuba, ɓe ngaylitoya daga kuuɗe mum boniiɗe, ɓe njaafita hakkeeji mum — wolde taaɓal nde hollita waylital bee nuunɗal. Ammaa ɗaɓɓitaare ɓurnde luggugo woni ’ɓernde hesre e ruuhu keso’, nde hollita ko ɓuri wuurnde yaasin werera. Ɓernde e miijo Deftere Allah woni ɗo yiɗde, nuunɗal e kimmu jolnitii. Tuubugo sabu majjum yottoo ka waataake e kuuɗe tan, haa motiife e sifaaji — ɗum woni waylugo ko neɗɗo yiɗi e ko o wuurii ngam, naa’ waylugo ko o waɗata tan.
elements.questionHint2: Allah waawii wi’i tan ’toppee waɗugo bonɗum’ — ngam ɗume a miijata o yawtii ɗum nden noddii ngam ɓernde hesre e ruuhu keso?
elements.sampleAnswer3: God calls the people to repent, turn from their wicked deeds, and throw away their sins — active language that involves deliberate change. But the deepest demand is for ’a new heart and a new spirit,‘ which points to something far more radical than adjusting outward conduct. The heart in biblical thought is the seat of the will, desires, and identity. Repentance therefore reaches beyond behaviour into motive and character — it is a transformation of what a person loves and lives for, not merely a change in what they do.
elements.questionHint3: God could have just said ’stop doing wrong things’ — why do you think he goes further and asks for a new heart and a new spirit?

elements.passageText1: <sup>20</sup># A.M 9.20 , 28 , 29  Da fari, na yi wa mutanen Dimashƙu wa’azi, sa’an nan na yi a Urushalima da dukan kewayen ƙasar Yahudiya, sa’an nan kuma na yi wa al’ummai, cewa su tuba su juyo ga Allah, su kuma yi aikin da zai nuna tubarsu.
elements.passageText3: <sup>20</sup>Da farko ga waɗanda suke a Damaskus, sa’an nan ga waɗanda suke a Urushalima da kuma cikin dukan Yahudiya, da kuma ga Al’ummai su ma, na yi wa’azi don su tuba su juyo ga Allah su kuma tabbatar da tubansu ta wurin ayyukansu.
elements.passageText4: <sup>20</sup>Arande mi wa’ajinanii yimɓe Dimasku, nden e yimɓe Urucaliima e leydi Yahuudiya fuu. Gaɗa non tokkumi nder yimɓe naa’ Yahuudanko’en, mbiimiɓe ɓe tuuba, ɓe ngaylitoyoo to Allah, ɓe kuwa kuuɗe kollayɗe ɓe tuubii. # KL 9.20,28,29.
elements.passageText5: <sup>20</sup>but I declared to those in Damascus first, and then to those in Jerusalem and in all Judea, and to the Gentiles, that they should repent and turn to God, performing deeds consistent with repentance.

elements.question1: Bulus ya ce tuba ta gaskiya ya kamata ta samar da ’ayyukan da suka dace da tuba’. Menene hakan ke nuna game da dangantaka tsakanin canjin ciki da aikin waje?
elements.question2: Bulus wi’i tuubugo goonga haani danyugo ’kuuɗe kollayɗe ɓe tuubii’. Ɗume ɗum hollata dow jokkondiral hakkunde waylital ɓernde e kuuɗe yaasin?
elements.question3: Paul says true repentance should produce ’deeds consistent with repentance’. What does that suggest about the relationship between inward change and outward action?
elements.sampleAnswer1: Yana nuna cewa su haɗuɗɗu ne amma sun bambanta: canjin ciki yana zuwa na farko kuma shi ne tushe, yayin da ayyukan waje suke ’ya’yan’ da ke girma daga gare shi. Tuba ba kawai iƙirari ko ji ba ne — tana samar da canjin da ake iya gani, mai daidaito a yadda mutum ke rayuwa. A lokaci guda, Bulus bai ce cewa ayyukan su ne tuba kansu ba; suna ’dace da’ ita, ma’ana suna fita daga juyi na gaskiya na ciki maimakon su ne juyin kansu.
